# OmniSight-Productizer — TODO

Full breakdown of all pending work. Grouped by priority tier (from
HANDOFF.md). Each task lists concrete sub-steps + deliverables.
Updated: 2026-04-15.

Legend (priority tiers):
- 🅐 Operator-blocked (physical action required)
- 🅑 Small products (< 1 day each, mostly UI/backend polish)
- 🅒 L4 product line — Layer A (shared infrastructure)
- 🅓 L4 product line — Layer B (per-product skill packs)
- 🅔 L4 product line — Layer C (software tracks)
- 🅕 META (organizational matrices / SOPs)

Status symbols (2026-04-20 introduced — see `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md`
§"Production Readiness Gate"). Historical `[x]` rows ship as-is; new
rows from 2026-04-20 onwards should use the layered convention:
- `[ ]` Not started
- `[~]` In progress (uncommitted / on a branch)
- `[x]` Merged — code + tests + CI green. **Does NOT imply production
       can run it.** (Pre-2026-04-20 rows use `[x]` loosely — read
       the inline historical comment for actual deploy state.)
- `[D]` Deployed — production image + env knobs + at least one live
       smoke pass. This is what "the feature is ON in prod" means.
- `[V]` Verified — deployed ≥ 24 h with no regression metric / error
       log. A milestone is "closed" only at this state.

---

## 🅐 Priority A — Operator blockers

### A1. L1-01 Real deploy.sh execution + NS migration + v0.1.0 tag (#172)
- [x] Run `scripts/deploy.sh prod v0.1.0` against production host *(done 2026-04-19: executed via `scripts/bootstrap_prod.sh --yes` — Path B docker-compose first-boot, equivalent path per docs/ops/multi-wsl-deployment.md. `scripts/deploy.sh` + `deploy-prod.sh` is the rolling-restart tool for subsequent upgrades; bootstrap needed a separate tool)*
- [x] Migrate GoDaddy NS records to Cloudflare *(done: `sora-dev.app` zone is under CF management — confirmed via `curl -sI https://ai.sora-dev.app/` returning `server: cloudflare` + `cf-ray: ...SIN` headers)*
- [x] Confirm Cloudflare Tunnel active + cert issued *(done 2026-04-19: `cloudflared` container in docker-compose.prod.yml `tunnel` profile registered 4 QUIC connections to CF edge; TLS terminated at CF edge per Zero Trust dashboard)*
- [x] Smoke GET `/api/health` from public domain *(done 2026-04-19: `curl https://ai.sora-dev.app/api/v1/health` returns `{"status":"online","engine":"OmniSight Engine","phase":"3.2"}`; full smoke test in `docs/ops/deploy_postmortem_2026-04-19.md` §3)*
- [x] Tag `v0.1.0` on master *(done: local tag created 2026-04-15)*
- [x] Push `v0.1.0` tag to origin *(done: pushed to origin 2026-04-15)*
- [x] Update HANDOFF with deploy URL + v0.1.0 release notes *(done: runbook + release notes added; HANDOFF.md 2026-04-19 entry adds go-live with live URL https://ai.sora-dev.app)*

### A3. Production wire-up of done-but-unwired milestones
> Both G4 (SQLite→PG, 6/6 ✅) and I10 (multi-worker + Redis shared state, 4/4 ✅) shipped code-ready weeks ago but the production stack has never actually wired them in — `.env` had `OMNISIGHT_WORKERS=1` and `OMNISIGHT_REDIS_URL` commented, the PG HA bundle has never been started. Three-phase rollout: Redis (no infra cost, fixes WAL storm symptoms today), Gemma4 local LLM (needs network, zero code), PG cutover (needs maintenance window).

- [D] **Phase 1**: Redis wire-up + multi-worker (WORKERS=1→2) <!-- 2026-04-20 Phase-1 wire-up: (1) docker-compose.prod.yml top-level `networks: ai_core {external:true, name:omnisight-ai-core_omnisight_net}` + backend-a/b 各 dual-home (default + ai_core); caddy/frontend/cloudflared 不 join (principle of least lateral reach); `backend-a` `backend` DNS alias 保留；commit `42326303` 37 行 compose-only. (2) `.env`(gitignored) `OMNISIGHT_REDIS_URL=redis://ai_cache:6379/0` 解註解 + `OMNISIGHT_WORKERS=1→2`（保守起步、非 Dockerfile 預設 max(2,cpu/2)，首跑 I10 prod 觀察 24h 再升）. (3) 線上驗證：`RedisLimiter` active + `shared_state redis ping True` + **SharedCounter cross-replica 原子性三跳實測 8→108**、`/proc walk` 見 PID 1 supervisor + PID 8/9 children = 2worker/replica × 2replica = **4 aggregate workers**、CF tunnel 40 並發 burst **40/40 × 200** 0 locked error、`redis-cli CLIENT LIST | grep sub=1 = 4`（對上 SSE pub/sub 4 worker）、used_memory 1.43M. (4) `backend/tests/test_phase1_ai_core_network.py` 10 顆 YAML parse 契約鎖：`networks.ai_core` external+name 凍結、dual-home 必須、**security denylist** 6 service（caddy/frontend/cloudflared/docker-socket-proxy/prometheus/grafana）不得 join ai_core；commit `dc983bf9`. (5) 110/110 鄰居測試 0 regression（rate_limit 35 + shared_state 39 + auth 24 + auth_baseline 12）. 遵循 `docs/sop/implement_phase_step.md` 7 步 SOP 完成 Step 1-5. **Rollback**：revert commit 42326303 + `.env` 改回 WORKERS=1 + OMNISIGHT_REDIS_URL 註解 + rolling recreate = 5 min back to pre-phase-1 state. **Follow-up**（不 block phase 2/3）：Redis 重連邏輯（ai_cache down→up backend 需重啟才 reconnect）、Redis 健康指標進 /readyz、OMNISIGHT_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX 多 env 支援、Prometheus scrape ai_cache. -->
- [D] **Phase 2**: Gemma4 當 Local LLM provider option <!-- 2026-04-20 Phase-2: (1) `backend/config.py` 加 `ollama_model: str = ""` Settings 欄位——原 `llm_model` 是 single-field、跨 provider 會 mis-route（Anthropic-shape 的 `claude-opus-4-7` 傳給 ollama 會 404；ollama adapter hardcoded fallback `llama3.1` 本 deployment 沒載）；(2) `backend/agents/llm.py::get_llm` 加 per-provider 模型解析分支：非主 provider + `provider=="ollama"` → 讀 `settings.ollama_model`（strip+非空）；empty/whitespace 走穿到 None 保 legacy backward-compat；非主非-ollama provider 一律 None 防 ollama_model 外洩；commit `f50ed738` code+test 255 行；(3) `.env` 加 4 knob：`OMNISIGHT_LLM_MODEL=claude-opus-4-7`（Opus 4.7 pin，取代 code-default Sonnet 4）+ `OMNISIGHT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://ai_engine:11434`（docker DNS、Phase-1 network 已接）+ `OMNISIGHT_OLLAMA_MODEL=gemma4:e4b`（9GiB efficient-class、speed/quality 平衡；ai_engine 有 6 個模型可選：gemma4:e2b/e4b/26b/31b、gemma2:27b、nomic-embed-text）+ `OMNISIGHT_LLM_FALLBACK_CHAIN=anthropic,ollama`（窄化成實際有 credential 的兩 provider）；(4) 7 顆新 test 鎖模型解析表 6 種 case + 1 regression guard（non-primary-non-ollama 不得外洩 ollama_model）；67/67 鄰居測試 0 regression；(5) 線上實測：`settings.get_model_name()='claude-opus-4-7'` / `get_llm()` 構 ChatAnthropic(model='claude-opus-4-7') / `get_llm(provider='ollama')` 構 ChatOllama(model='gemma4:e4b') / **real E2E inference** — ollama gemma4:e4b 對 "Reply with exactly the single word: pong" 回 `'pong'`；rolling recreate backend-a → backend-b SQLite WAL lock 契約遵守。**Follow-up**：dashboard Providers panel UI 驗證（前端應讀 `/api/v1/providers` 顯示 Opus 4.7、本回合沒 UI-test、建議操作者開一次看看）、ollama 模型切換 UI（目前只能改 env+restart、未來可做 per-invoke model-picker）、gemma4:e4b 之外 preload 其他 gemma4:* 或 gemma2:27b 實測延遲/品質比較。 -->

- **Phase 3**: G4 PostgreSQL cutover — **LIVE on PG 2026-04-20**
  - [D] **3-Infra**: PG HA pair + backend network + migrator verified end-to-end
  - [D] **3-Runtime**: PgCompatConnection aiosqlite-compat wrapper + db.py URL dispatcher + cutover complete <!-- 2026-04-20 3-Runtime deployed (commits `0cdf072d` / `320f2550` / `be55804b`): Instead of per-call-site port of 80 `_conn().execute(...)` sites (multi-session full rewrite), shipped a **aiosqlite-compat wrapper** `backend/db_pg_compat.py` (~310 LOC) that speaks the `aiosqlite.Connection` surface db.py expects but dispatches to asyncpg underneath. Handles: ? → $N placeholder translation (string-literal-aware state machine)；4 SQLite-ism SQL rewrites；PRAGMA/VACUUM no-op；SELECT vs DML dispatch；asyncio.Lock serialise；lazy tx；`_ExecuteResult` deferred-execution proxy 支援 dual-mode `await` + `async with`。`backend/db.py::init()` 加 URL dispatcher。3 boot-time fixes: dual-mode execute return / main.py startup datetime() SQLite-ism / health.py sqlite_master probe。4 call sites 的 `cur.lastrowid` 換成 `RETURNING id` (audit.py / dag_storage.py / prompt_registry.py × 2)。Live verified: `/readyz` migrations.current=0016、1120 rows on PG、streaming replication intact。 -->
  - [D] **3-P2**: SSE buffering cascade root-cause fix — edge path routing via Caddy :8080 <!-- 2026-04-20 P2 (commits `fb00b291` + `894c4bc2`): Operator 重登 dashboard 後 cascade 復發（429 + 黃色權限不足 + flicker + bounce /login）；追 trace 發現 PG 無涉、根因是 **Next.js `rewrites()` 當 API proxy** 對 SSE 做 response buffering（Node http proxy 不 honor flush_interval）；browser EventSource 等不到 first byte、判 dead connection、快速重連、燒 per-IP 60/60s rate bucket、login 端 429。**Fix**: `deploy/reverse-proxy/Caddyfile` 新開 `:8080` edge-router block — `handle /api/v1/*` → backend-a+b (flush_interval -1)、`handle` catch-all → frontend:3000。`:443` 和 `:8000` listener 完全不動（backward compat）。docker-compose.prod.yml cloudflared comment 改寫：CF tunnel Public Hostname service URL 從 `http://frontend:3000` → `http://caddy:8080`（canonical pattern 匹配 K8s Ingress / AWS ALB / CF Workers）。`backend/tests/test_reverse_proxy_caddyfile.py::TestPort8080EdgeRouter` 7 新 drift guard tests 鎖不變量（block exists / API handle 到 backend / catch-all 到 frontend / **negative assertion** /api/v1/* 不得指向 frontend:3000 防未來 merge 回 rewrite / flush_interval -1 在兩 handle / 不走 TLS / :8080 不得 expose 到 host）。Live verified internally: time-to-first-byte 8ms (原 60s+零 byte)、15s 捕 10 real-time events、舊 listener 0 regression、backend error log 空。**Operator 需做**: CF Zero Trust dashboard → Networks → Tunnels → tunnel → Public Hostnames → 把 `ai.sora-dev.app` Service URL 從 `http://frontend:3000` → `http://caddy:8080` Save（30 秒、無 code deploy）。Rollback = 同設定改回。**為何是正規 fix 而非 workaround**: Next.js `rewrites()` 官方文件明說不保證 streaming；edge path routing 是 K8s / AWS / CF / Vercel 都用的 canonical pattern；未來搬 K8s / Fly.io 此架構直接可搬、不用重寫 proxy 邏輯。 -->
  - [D] **3-P5**: single AuthProvider + dashboard auth gate <!-- 2026-04-20 P5 (commit `0a5d9f94`): P2 edge-routing 後操作者仍報 dashboard flicker + toast + bounce；root cause 一 = `app/login/page.tsx` 自己又包一個 `<AuthProvider>` 疊在 layout.tsx 既有的之外，inner login() setUser 後 outer `/` 讀到還是 null → redirect 迴圈。Fix 移掉 inner wrapper + app/page.tsx 加 auth gate（loading / !user 下不 mount panels）避免 14 支 XHR 在 auth 解析前就開火。 -->
  - [D] **3-P6**: rename `/api/v1/system/` → `/api/v1/runtime/` to bypass CF WAF Custom Rule 5 <!-- 2026-04-20 P6 (commit `0e0bcd46`): root cause 二 = `docs/ops/cloudflare_settings.md` line 30 的 WAF Custom Rule 5「Block `/api/v1/system/`」對 logged-in operator 的 legitimate 流量 fire → 回 Managed Challenge 頁（`Just a moment...`）with 403。Backend log 零 403 = CF edge terminated。證據：P5 的 TOAST-403 診斷器捕到 `body=<!DOCTYPE html>...Just a moment`。Fix: atomic rename `/system/` → `/runtime/` across `backend/routers/{system,integration,simulations}.py` (prefix) + lib/api.ts (35 calls) + 4 components + 11 backend tests (130 refs) + openapi.json + api-types.ts。Live 驗 `/runtime/info → 200` / `/system/info → 403`（CF 仍擋、但無流量走）。**Operator follow-up**: (i) delete CF WAF Custom Rule 5 OR (ii) re-point path 到 `/api/v1/runtime/admin/` 保 edge defence-in-depth；30 秒工時。 -->
  - [D] **3-P7 Fix A**: strip P4/P5 diagnostic instrumentation <!-- 2026-04-20 P7 Fix A (commit `b1a3fd3e`): P6 rename 後操作者看到 `/?panel=orchestrator` ErrorBoundary + 大量 429。Log 顯示 `/api/v1/__diag_render_count:1 429` 連續 5 次 = P5 debug 裝的 render counter 自己在燒 per-IP 60/60s token bucket；useEngine setInterval(5s) + SSE event + XHR completion 都觸 re-render → POST → 429。Fix: 拔掉所有 P4/P5 診斷器 — app/page.tsx module-level counter + POST；api-error-toast-center 的 TOAST-403 console.error + backship POST（description 也 revert 回 generic「您沒有此操作的存取權限」）；backend/main.py 的 `/__diag_render_count` endpoint；auth_baseline.py allowlist + verbose 401 log；auth.py current_user P4 diag block。-154+3 行。 -->
  - [D] **3-P7 Fix B**: unify SharedTokenUsage schema to canonical `_token_usage` shape <!-- 2026-04-20 P7 Fix B (commit `b4b1c55f` + test `12490bbf`): `backend/routers/system.py:1295` 的 `/tokens` endpoint 兩路 fallback — `_token_usage_shared.get_all()` (Redis) 和 `_token_usage` (local dict) schema 分叉：shared 存 `requests` / `avg_latency_ms` 缺 `total_tokens` / `last_used`；local 存 canonical 8 field。Redis 一有資料 router 回傳 shared 形狀 → 前端 `TokenUsageStats:389` 的 `formatTokens(item.totalTokens)` 拿到 undefined → `undefined.toString()` → ErrorBoundary。Pre-P6 CF WAF 擋 `/system/tokens` 所以 latent；P6 rename 打通後顯形。Fix: `backend/shared_state.py` 加三個 helper — `_fresh_token_entry` (canonical shape SSOT) / `_normalize_token_entry` (in-place legacy→canonical rename + setdefault；對 pre-P7 Redis payload backward-compat) / `_strip_internal` (`_total_latency` 內部 bookkeeping 不外洩)；SharedTokenUsage.track + get_all 兩路都走 canonical。+95-33 行。Step 4 regression guards: 4 新 test (canonical shape lock / internal-field strip / legacy backfill / legacy-read-then-track canonicalises write-back)，TestSharedTokenUsage 8/8 綠 0.12s (+88 行)。 -->
  - [D] **3-Runtime-v2**: asyncpg pool-native rewrite — 徹底移除 `PgCompatConnection` shim，80+ call sites 改走 `async with get_pool().acquire() as conn` polymorphic 形狀 <!-- 2026-04-21 Phase-3-Runtime-v2（~70 commits since 2026-04-20, plan: `docs/phase-3-runtime-v2/02-sub-phases.md`; operator 直接指令「品質最大化、不為減工時而妥協」）：Phase-3-Runtime v1 的 aiosqlite-compat wrapper 運行期穩但結構上是 tech debt — 單 connection + asyncio.Lock serialise、無 pool scaling、每次 execute 都跑 `? → $N` 翻譯、無法支持 advisory lock / SAVEPOINT / per-tx tenant_id。v2 整層重做成 asyncpg.Pool native: (1) `backend/db_pool.py` 新增 process-global `asyncpg.Pool` + FastAPI lifespan init/close + `async def get_conn() -> AsyncGenerator` FastAPI Depends；connection-level session params 統一 `timezone='UTC'` / `statement_timeout='30s'` / `lock_timeout='10s'` / `idle_in_transaction_session_timeout='60s'`；pool defaults min=5 max=20 per worker。(2) 80+ CRUD helper 改成 `async def fn(conn: asyncpg.Connection, ...)` polymorphic — 單次操作 `async with get_pool().acquire() as conn`，多語句 atomicity 由 caller 開 `async with conn.transaction()` 並把 conn 傳進來。(3) 關鍵模組加 `pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext($1))` per-key serialisation：audit.py hash chain（SP-4.1）、auth.py session rotation（SP-4.3b）、secret_store first-boot key（Step B.3）；比 `SELECT FOR UPDATE` 更輕、不阻塞讀。(4) atomicity bug fix — `tenant_secrets.upsert_secret` 舊 SELECT-then-INSERT 在 pool 並發下會撞 UniqueViolation，改成 `ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, secret_type, key_name) DO UPDATE SET ... RETURNING id` atomic（SP-4.6）。(5) 新 alembic 0017 (PG tsvector + GIN 取代 SQLite FTS5，gated by dialect)、0018 (`mfa_challenges` table 取代 per-worker `_webauthn_challenges` + `_pending_mfa` dict)。**Epic 1-11 規劃 vs 實交付**：Epic 1 Foundation 6 commits (SP-1.1~1.4)；Epic 2 Schema prep 1 commit (SP-2.1 alembic 0017 `fa230674`)；Epic 3 db.py domain slices 13 commits (SP-3.1~3.13)；Epic 4 Auth/audit/tenant_secrets 6+2 commits (SP-4.1~4.6 + 2 follow-up unstick)；Epic 5 Residual callers 10 commits + retrospective (SP-5.1~5.10 + `3a69d76c` bonus-bugs doc)；Process improvement round 加 `.env.test` isolation + SOP Step 1/2/3 強化；Step A (A.1 #121 decision_profiles / A.2 #93 memory_decay) 2 commits；Step B Epic 6 prep cluster 4 commits 解 #102/#90/#104/#116 四個 multi-worker bug，每個配 `xfail(strict=True)` regression guard in - **Phase 4**: Dashboard polling consolidation — 把 `useEngine` 的 11-endpoint × 5s fan-out 換成 `/dashboard/summary` aggregator + SSE push <!-- 2026-04-21 源起：operator 驗收 Phase-3-v2 發現 3 個最右邊 panel (OPS SUMMARY / ORCHESTRATION / PIPELINE TIMELINE) 仍 429。根因不是 CF、不是 per_ip — `hooks/use-engine.ts:170` 在 `Promise.allSettled` 裡每 **5 秒**打 **11 個 endpoint** (systemStatus / systemInfo / devices / spec / repos / logs / tokens / budget / unread / compression / simulations) = **132 req/min per tab** 自己就超過 free tier 的 per_user=120/min；加上 panel-local 輪詢（ops_summary / orchestration / pipeline_timeline / audit / run_history / arch_indicator / host_devices，5-15s 各自）= 單 tab 合計 **150-200 req/min**。SP-8.1c (`8542d67e`) 臨時把 free.per_user 從 120 → 1200 解了症狀，但這是「把 defensive cap 提到合法使用量之上」、不是真正 fix — cap 失去防禦意義。**Phase 4 做什麼**：(1) 新增 `backend/routers/dashboard.py` + `GET /api/v1/dashboard/summary` endpoint，一個 request 回傳所有 11 個子查詢的 composite JSON；內部 goroutine-style `asyncio.gather` 把 11 個查詢並發跑、共用一個 pool connection 或多個 short-hold conns（權衡讀）；response 定義在 `lib/api.ts::DashboardSummary` TypedDict 對應；(2) `hooks/use-engine.ts` 改成單點 `api.getDashboardSummary()` 每 10s 打一次、內部 demux 回原本的 11 個 state setter；(3) 真正 push-friendly 的東西（agents/tasks/events/SSE）走 SSE 不輪詢、已有基建；(4) 三個 panel-local 輪詢 component（ops_summary / orchestration / pipeline_timeline）也看能否收進 `/dashboard/summary` 或改吃 SSE。**完成後**：單 tab 從 150-200 req/min → ~15-20 req/min（只剩 dashboard/summary + panel 的 SSE 連線），per_user cap 可以拉回合理的 **300/60s 防禦值**（3 tab 還有 headroom）、真的變成「防濫用」而不是「不讓人用」。**風險**：aggregator endpoint 需要小心 partial-failure 語意（某子查詢掛了、要回傳其他 11 個還是整體 500？）— 建議沿用 `useEngine` 現有的 `Promise.allSettled` 的 fault-tolerant 模式、response schema 每個 subkey 都有 `{ok: bool, data | error}` 包裝；前端 demux 時 per-subkey 判斷。**scope 紀律**：不重寫其他 10+ 個輪詢面板、只動 dashboard 最熱的幾條路徑；不動 SSE 基建；不動 rate_limit 配額（那是 follow-up、要等到 useEngine 瘦身驗證完才改回）。估 3-5 commits、單 session 可完。 -->

  - [x] **4-4 Panel-local polling triage**：盤點 `ops-summary-panel` / `orchestration-panel` / `pipeline-timeline` / `audit-panel` / `run-history-panel` / `arch-indicator` / `host-device-panel` / `integration-settings` — 哪些能收進 `/dashboard/summary`、哪些已有 SSE 可改吃 push、哪些保留獨立輪詢；文件化在 `docs/dashboard-polling-inventory.md` <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-4-4 shipped: `docs/dashboard-polling-inventory.md` 落地（~130 行，6 節）— 8 panel × 3 軸（interval / SSE / 現況 endpoint）全表，決策表、per-tab request budget（162→36→26 req/min/tab 三階段預測）、Phase 4-5 前置工作清單（ops-summary + arch-indicator 兩個 ABSORB 目標 + `/dashboard/summary` 加 `opsSummary` / `platformStatus` 兩 sub-key + `DashboardSummary` 型別 + test_dashboard_summary.py 覆蓋擴充），以及 Phase 4 scope discipline 的三個明確 non-goal。分類結論：**ABSORB × 2**（ops-summary-panel、arch-indicator — always-visible + slow-changing + cheap）；**SSE-FIRST + safety-net poll × 3**（orchestration / pipeline / run-history — SSE 已有、poll 當 convergence safety net、不重寫）；**KEEP INDEPENDENT × 2**（audit-panel tab-local、integration-settings modal-local）；**ALREADY SSE-ONLY × 1**（host-device-panel via `host.metrics.tick`）。零 code 改動 — 本 SP 是 triage/planning doc，per Phase 4 preamble scope discipline。 -->
  - [x] **4-5 Reverse rate_limit 回防禦值**：validated 前面 4 步都綠後、`backend/quota.py::PLAN_QUOTAS["free"].per_user` 從 1200 → 300（3 tab × ~15 req/min = 45 仍 6x headroom）、`per_tenant` 回 600；`test_rate_limit_free_plan.py` 同步；成為真正的 defensive cap <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-4-5 shipped: `backend/quota.py::PLAN_QUOTAS["free"]` `per_user` 1200→300、`per_tenant` 1500→600；`per_ip` 保持 1200（CF-Free-RL-off rationale 不變、edge 無實用 gate 在 1200/min 以下）。核心論點：4-1/4-2/4-3 讓單 tab 從 132+ req/min 降到 ~6 aggregator req/min（+ safety-net 合計 10-15 req/min），300/60s 對 3 tab × ~15 = 45 req/min 留 6x headroom、600/60s 對 3-4 user × ~45 留 ~3x，同時恢復被 SP-8.1c 讓渡掉的 defensive cap 語意。不變量：`per_tenant >= per_user`（600>=300）與 `per_ip < per_ip(starter)`（1200<2400）仍成立。Test sync：`test_rate_limit_free_plan.py::test_free_per_user_budget_matches_dashboard_burst` 300 / `test_free_per_tenant_budget_matches_multi_user_envelope` 600，兩 docstring 改寫紀錄 120→1200→300 三段演進+引用 Phase-4 aggregator 減量證據。驗證：`pytest test_quota.py test_rate_limit_free_plan.py` 9/9 綠、`test_rate_limit_middleware.py test_rate_limit.py` 13/13 綠 0 regression（`test_ip_rate_limit_triggers` 動態讀 per_ip.capacity、per_ip 未改故仍 2420-iter loop 正常觸 429）。Module-global audit：PLAN_QUOTAS 是 frozen dataclass + process-wide constant、每 worker 自己 import 得到同值、不需 Redis/PG 協調。Read-after-write audit：純常數調整、無 serialisation 行為變化。Scope 紀律：未動其他 tier（starter/pro/enterprise）、未動 middleware 邏輯、未動 CF WAF/Access、未動 SSE。 -->

- **Phase 5**: Multi-account forge integrations — 把 `{host: token}` 單人單 host 資料模型升級成完整多帳號模型，cover GitHub / GitLab / Gerrit / JIRA 四個 platform <!-- 2026-04-21 源起：operator 指出現在 UI 看起來只允許每個 platform 一個帳號，實際比看起來更糟 — 根因是 `backend/config.py:88-89` 的資料 shape `github_token_map: JSON {host → token}` / `gitlab_token_map: 同` 在 schema 層就**不支援同 host 多帳號**（Object.fromEntries 會吞掉同 key 的前筆），UI 的 `MultipleInstancesSection` 看起來可 add 多筆實際序列化時撞 key collision 靜默蓋掉。Operator 正確指出 github / gitlab / gerrit / jira 在真實使用場景下都是「同一個 host 可能有 3-4 個 account」(github.com 個人+公司+開源+客戶 / gitlab.com 多個客戶 / 自架多個 gerrit 或多個 jira instance)。**問題不只 UI、牽涉到 DB + API + integration layer + credential resolver**。**現況盤點**：(1) **設定面**：`github_token` / `github_token_map` / `gitlab_token` / `gitlab_url` / `gitlab_token_map` / `gerrit_url` / `gerrit_ssh_host` / `gerrit_ssh_port` / `gerrit_project` / `gerrit_webhook_secret` / `gerrit_instances` (JSON list，已部分支持多實例) / `gerrit_replication_targets` / `notification_jira_url` / `notification_jira_token` / `notification_jira_project` / `jira_webhook_secret` — 4 platform 共 ~17 scalar + 3 JSON blob 全散在 `Settings` 單例，沒有 DB table。(2) **credential resolver**：`backend/git_credentials.py::_build_registry` 把 YAML + JSON map + scalar fallback 拼成 in-memory list，有 cache、無 tenant 隔離、無 per-URL pattern match。(3) **call site**：掃到 11 個 py 檔消費這些設定 — `agents/tools.py` (4 refs)、`gerrit.py` (7)、`git_auth.py` (9)、`git_credentials.py` (22)、`git_platform.py` (3)、`issue_tracker.py` (10, JIRA)、`release.py` (7)、`routers/integration.py` (57, 最大宗)、`routers/orchestrator.py` (2)、`routers/webhooks.py` (14, HMAC 驗簽)、`workspace.py` (若干)。(4) **security**：scalar field 直接存 `.env`（明文；operator 用 `secret_store.py` Fernet 加密 `tenant_secrets` 是近期做的模式，但 forge token 沒搬過去）。(5) **tenant**：現在所有 credential 是 process-global，不是 per-tenant — 多租戶場景下一個 tenant 的 GitHub 帳號全系統共用。**正確資料模型**（industry standard，參考 GitKraken / GitHub Desktop / git-credential-manager）：`git_accounts` table 每筆一個 account，key 是 `(tenant_id, id)` 唯一；schema ≈ `{id TEXT PK, tenant_id TEXT, platform TEXT('github'|'gitlab'|'gerrit'|'jira'), instance_url TEXT, label TEXT, username TEXT, encrypted_token TEXT, encrypted_ssh_key TEXT, ssh_host, ssh_port, project, webhook_secret_enc, url_patterns JSONB, is_default BOOL, enabled BOOL, metadata JSONB, created_at, updated_at, last_used_at}`。**解析策略**：`pick_account_for_url(url)` 走 `url_patterns` (eg `"github.com/acme-corp/*"`) 第一筆 match → fallback 到該 platform 的 `is_default=true` → 都沒就 raise `MissingCredentialError`。**Scope / 風險 / 工程量評估**：這不是小修、牽涉到 DB schema / alembic / credential resolver / 4 platform 所有 call site / UI 大幅重寫 / legacy 設定 migration；估 **15-25 commits / 2-4 sessions**。不是 blocker（單人單 account 仍可用），但未來多用戶或 enterprise 情境必卡。-->

asyncpg.Record → dict 正規化：decrypt `encrypted_token/ssh_key/webhook_secret` via `backend.secret_store`，parse `url_patterns/metadata` JSONB (PG) ∨ TEXT-of-JSON (SQLite)，decrypt 失敗 per-row downgrade 成 empty string + warn log（single bad row 不會 KO 整個 registry read）。(4) `pick_account_for_url` resolution chain：`url_patterns` fnmatch → exact host → substring host → platform default fallback (via `pick_default`)；`pick_default` prefer `is_default=TRUE` row → fallback first-of-platform；`pick_by_id` pool path `WHERE tenant_id=$1 AND id=$2` 保證 tenant 隔離（其他 tenant 同 id row 看不到）。(5) 既有 sync API (`find_credential_for_url` / `get_token_for_url` / `get_ssh_key_for_url` / `get_webhook_secret_for_host`) 完全保留行為語意、僅內部改讀新 shim 的 virtual row 形狀 — rows 5-6/7/8 call-site sweep 前 11+ 個 sync caller 零改動。(6) 新 test file `backend/tests/test_git_credentials_phase5_2.py` 25 顆 test — 2 virtual-row shape parity / 3 tenant 解析順序 / 3 legacy shim + deprecation-warn 一次性 / 10 async resolver 行為（URL pattern match, ssh form, exact/substring host, platform default fallback, is_default 優先, first-of-platform fallback, unknown platform → None, by-id tenant 隔離, empty tenant → shim fallback, decrypt failure graceful） — 用 `_FakePool`+`_FakeConn`+`_FakeRow` stub 覆蓋 pool happy path，無需 live PG。**驗證**：`pytest backend/tests/test_git_credentials_phase5_2.py` 25/25 passed in 0.14s；regression `pytest backend/tests/test_multi_repo.py backend/tests/test_git_accounts_schema.py backend/tests/test_integration_settings.py` 126/126 passed (+ 7 skipped PG-live)；`pytest backend/tests/test_git_auth.py test_repo_ingest.py test_external_webhooks.py` 71/71 passed。`test_webhooks.py` 31 顆 pre-existing fail（`db_pool.get_pool called before init_pool`，與本 row 無關、git stash 驗證）— 不 regress 但不新解。**Pre-commit fingerprint grep**：`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` 對 `git_credentials.py` + `test_git_credentials_phase5_2.py` 0 命中。**Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**：新增 `_LEGACY_WARN_EMITTED` bool，each worker 第一次 emit 一次、跨 worker 語意一致（同 log 線 × N replica，ops 一眼看出 legacy 流量 footprint）；既有 `_CREDENTIALS_CACHE`+`_CACHE_LOCK` 維持 answer #1（each worker 從同 Settings 推導相同 cache）；async 路徑 no cache（git_accounts O(<10 rows/tenant)、staleness risk 不值得）。**Read-after-write audit**：本 row 零動寫路徑，只新增讀。row 5-4 CRUD 落地後才有 write serialisation 話題（屆時跟 SP-4.6 `tenant_secrets.upsert_secret` 同走 `ON CONFLICT ... DO UPDATE` 原子 upsert）。**Scope 紀律**：嚴格只完成 row 5-2 — 0 行 CRUD endpoint（row 5-4）/ 0 行 URL-pattern grammar 最終決策（row 5-3 會 refine）/ 0 行 `last_used_at` touch-on-resolve（row 5-3）/ 0 行 auto-migrate（row 5-5）/ 0 call-site sweep（rows 5-6/7/8）/ 0 UI（row 5-9）。sync 既有 API 全部保留以免本 commit blast radius 擴張；後續 rows 可以一個 caller 一個 caller 切。**Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests 綠；pool 路徑在 deploy 後立即生效（`git_accounts` 目前為空、所以所有 caller 落入 legacy shim fallback → 行為與 5-2 前等價，除了 deprecation warn log 多一行）；row 5-5 auto-migration 落地後 shim fallback 才會 dry up、真實 `git_accounts` 行被讀。**Next gate**: dev-only 維持到 row 5-3/5-4；Phase 5 到 5-9 (UI) + 5-11 (soak) 才 flip deployed-active。**Rollback**：revert 本 commit（`git_credentials.py` 回到舊 dict shape + 無 async API），sync caller 立即恢復；pool 路徑因為 git_accounts 空表無 reader 所以無資料損失。 -->

`backend/git_credentials.py` 新增 `MissingCredentialError(LookupError)` + `require_account_for_url()` (raises) + `_touch_last_used_at(id, tid)` best-effort UPDATE helper + `_normalize_url_for_pattern_match(url)` (scheme-strip + lowercase, covers HTTPS / `git@host:org/repo` / `ssh://git@host/...`) + `_matches_pattern(url, pat)` (fnmatch glob, anchored, defensive on non-string)；`pick_account_for_url` / `pick_default` / `pick_by_id` 加 `touch=True` 參數 + 解析成功後 best-effort 觸 last_used_at；resolver chain 維持 4 步 (url_patterns glob → exact host → substring host → platform default)；first-match-wins 由 `_fetch_git_accounts_rows` SELECT `ORDER BY is_default DESC, last_used_at DESC NULLS LAST, platform, id` 保證確定性。(2) `docs/phase-5-multi-account/01-design.md` 新增 §3.10「URL-pattern resolver contract」— pattern syntax 表 (`*` / `?` / `[seq]` / `[!seq]` / 其餘 literal 含 `.` `-` `_` `/`)、normalisation 對照表、anchored-not-substring 警語、deterministic 4-key 排序、touch-on-resolve LRU primitive、`require_*` vs `pick_*` 對照、4-step resolution chain、special-chars-in-org-names 章節（GitHub 禁 `[` `]` `*` `?` 唯一可能撞 `?` 但實務罕見）。(3) `backend/tests/test_git_credentials_phase5_3.py` 26 顆 test — 4 normalize_url / 4 _matches_pattern (basic glob, anchored, `?` single char, defensive empty/non-string) / 3 special chars (dot literal-not-regex, dash+underscore literal, unicode pass-through) / 3 multi-match (default wins, LRU breaks ties, specific pattern beats default with no patterns) / 1 no-pattern-match → platform default fallback / 2 require (returns row when match, raises MissingCredentialError when no default & no match — 訊息含 URL + tenant 給 grep) / 1 MissingCredentialError isinstance LookupError / 6 last_used_at touch (pick_account_for_url / pick_default / pick_by_id 三條路 + touch=False 抑制 + None resolve 不 touch + no-pool silent skip + empty id silent skip) / 1 ssh-form 同 pattern resolve. **驗證**: (5) Smoke import + async helper exercise 通過 (require_account_for_url 在 no-default 場景正確 raise MissingCredentialError). (6) Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #2): touch UPDATE 是 PG 單語句 auto-commit、跨 worker 由 row-level lock 序列化、LWW 語意正確（最新 timestamp 贏，符合 LRU 意圖）；無新 module-global. (7) Read-after-write audit: touch 是 fire-and-forget best-effort、resolve return 不等 touch commit；無新 serialisation 行為變化. (8) Scope 紀律: 嚴格只完成 row 5-3 — 0 行 CRUD endpoint (5-4) / 0 行 auto-migration (5-5) / 0 call-site sweep (5-6/7/8) / 0 UI (5-9). **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests 綠；resolver 改進在下次 backend image rebuild + rolling recreate 後即生效；目前 git_accounts 表為空 (5-5 auto-migration 未跑)，所有 caller 仍走 legacy shim fallback、行為與 5-2 等價，僅內部 API 多了 require_*/MissingCredentialError 給 5-6/7/8 call-site sweep 使用. **Next gate**: dev-only 維持到 row 5-4 (CRUD endpoint)；Phase 5 整體要到 5-9 + 5-11 才 flip deployed-active. **Rollback**: revert 本 commit, resolver API 退回 5-2 形態（無 `touch=True` kwarg、無 `require_*` / `MissingCredentialError`），git_accounts 表結構不動. -->

Shim still synthesises `default-github` / `default-gitlab` virtual rows for the legitimate github.com / gitlab.com callers, so behaviour-preserving for empty-`git_accounts` deployments. **Intentionally NOT touched**: `legacy_credential_migration.py` (5-5 migration reader), `_build_registry` (the shim absorbs legacy reads by design), `integration.py::get_settings` + `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` (5-9 UI + 5-10 deprecation scope), Gerrit paths (5-7), JIRA paths (5-8). **Tests**: new `test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep.py` 11 顆 — 3 release (happy path + skip-no-token + instance_url override) / 3 issue_tracker (GL sync with resolver + error path + GH sync with resolver env) / 3 integration probes (GH with resolver token + not_configured + GL instance_url override) / 2 regression guards on get_token_for_url (GHE leak blocked + github.com still resolves). Updated `test_release.py::test_github_upload_*_mock` 兩顆改 patch `backend.git_credentials.pick_default`。**驗證**：`pytest` 11/11 passed；廣域 242/242 passed across test_multi_repo + test_git_auth + test_git_credentials_phase5_2/5_3 + test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep + test_external_webhooks + test_git_accounts_schema + test_git_accounts_crud + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_integration_settings (30 PG-live-gated skips, 0 regressions)。pre-existing 4 `test_release::TestRelease*` + 31 `test_webhooks::TestGerrit*` failures 均為 pool-init fixture issue、git stash 驗證為 predating this row. **Fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` 對 7 touched prod 檔 + 2 test 檔 0 命中。**Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**：0 新 module-globals；call sites inline-import resolver 函式、無 local cache；每 worker 打到同 async pool (或同 shim source)、by construction cross-worker coherent. **Read-after-write audit**：0 新 write path — 只重導 read — 無新 serialisation→parallel 行為變化. **Scope 紀律**：嚴格只完成 row 5-6 — 0 行 Gerrit (5-7) / 0 行 JIRA (5-8) / 0 行 UI rewrite (5-9) / 0 行 deprecation (5-10) / 0 行 soak (5-11). **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests 綠；legacy 行為對 empty-`git_accounts` deployments 維持不變，所以本 row 單獨 ship 安全、不必等 5-5 auto-migration 先跑。**Next gate**: dev-only 維持到 5-9 (UI) 或 5-11 (soak)；Phase 5 整體到 5-9 + 5-11 才 flip deployed-active. **Rollback**: `git revert 56af3952` 全退回 — 無 schema / 無 data 變化；call sites 恢復直接讀 settings.github_token / gitlab_token / gitlab_url. -->
  - [x] **5-7 Call-site sweep — Gerrit paths**：`backend/gerrit.py` + `routers/webhooks.py` (HMAC 驗簽要看 which account 的 webhook_secret)；`gerrit_instances` JSON list 裡的每筆 → 搬成 `git_accounts(platform='gerrit')` row；`gerrit_replication_targets` 留 global scalar（它是 replication destination list 不是 account）；驗 `create-change` / `set-reviewer` SSH ops 能拿到對的 credential per project <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-7 shipped: 5 prod files ported + 1 new resolver helper + 1 new test file (19 tests) + 1 existing test updated. **Ported call sites**: (1) `backend/gerrit.py` — `GerritClient` rewrite: new `_resolve_account(project)` method scans tenant-scoped `git_accounts(platform='gerrit')` for project-name match (case-insensitive exact), falls back to `pick_default("gerrit", touch=False)` (which honours operator-marked `is_default=TRUE` AND the legacy shim's synthesised `default-gerrit` virtual row from `settings.gerrit_*` scalars). Old `_ssh_args` property → new `_ssh_args_for(account)` method that takes per-account `ssh_host`/`ssh_port`/`ssh_key`. All 6 public ops (`query_change` / `query_open_changes` / `post_review` / `post_inline_comments` / `submit_change` / `test_connection`) now resolve account before building argv; new `set_reviewer` op added to cover the row 5-7 spec acceptance criterion explicitly (`set-reviewers --add <user>` SSH op routed to per-project account). No-account path returns `{"error": "Gerrit not configured"}` cleanly. (2) `backend/git_credentials.py` — added `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async(host, platform, *, tenant_id=None)`: async sibling of the legacy sync `get_webhook_secret_for_host`; resolution chain = exact host match in registry (filtered by platform) → `pick_default(platform, touch=False)` → settings scalar fallback (`gerrit_webhook_secret` / `github_webhook_secret` / `gitlab_webhook_secret`). LRU not touched (webhook traffic shouldn't disturb interactive `last_used_at` ordering). Forward-reference to `pick_default` is safe because async invocation is always post-module-load. (3) `backend/routers/webhooks.py::gerrit_webhook` HMAC verify — switched per-instance secret read from sync `get_webhook_secret_for_host` to async `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` so operator-added `git_accounts(platform='gerrit')` rows are honoured; scalar-first then per-host check structure preserved (single-instance deploys with only `settings.gerrit_webhook_secret` set still authenticate). Same async port applied to `github_webhook` + `gitlab_webhook` per-instance secret reads (closes the gap left by 5-6 which only ported token reads, not webhook secret reads). (4) `backend/routers/invoke.py` create-change auto-push: `_cfg.gerrit_ssh_host` / `gerrit_ssh_port` / `gerrit_project` reads replaced with `pick_default("gerrit")`-resolved `ssh_host` / `ssh_port` / `project`; gates on `_cfg.gerrit_enabled` master-switch (intentionally kept as scalar — it's a feature flag, not a credential) AND `if ssh_host and project:` so missing fields gracefully skip. (5) `backend/routers/integration.py::_test_gerrit` probe button — now uses `pick_default("gerrit", touch=False)` so the probe SSH-args its way to the resolved host/port, not the stale scalars. **Intentionally NOT touched** (per row 5-7 spec): `settings.gerrit_replication_targets` (list of git remote *destinations*, not credentials — stays global); `backend/agents/tools.py::settings.gerrit_enabled` reads (4 sites — master-switch feature flag, not credential); `backend/git_auth.py::detect_platform`'s `settings.gerrit_ssh_host` read (URL classification only); `backend/workspace.py::settings.gerrit_*` repo-source default (setup-time fallback, not per-call credential); `backend/routers/integration.py` Settings-UI mirror reads (5-9 / 5-10 scope: UI rewrite + deprecation). **Tests**: new `backend/tests/test_phase5_7_call_site_sweep.py` 19 顆 — 8 GerritClient (per-project resolve / default fallback / no-account → None / post_review / post_review error / set_reviewer / test_connection / test_connection not_configured) + 4 webhook secret helper (per-instance match / pick_default fallback / scalar fallback / per-platform filtering) + 3 webhook HMAC integration (per-instance authenticates / wrong-sig 401 / scalar fallback) + 2 integration probe (resolved host / not_configured) + 2 invoke create-change push (URL build from resolver / skip when no host); existing `backend/tests/test_gerrit.py::test_ssh_args` rewritten to `test_ssh_args_for_account` + new `test_ssh_args_for_account_uses_per_account_key` to lock per-account SSH key precedence. **Verification**: `pytest backend/tests/test_phase5_7_call_site_sweep.py` 19/19 passed in 0.39s; Phase-5 neighbour sweep `pytest test_gerrit + test_git_credentials_phase5_2 + test_git_credentials_phase5_3 + test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep + test_phase5_7_call_site_sweep + test_external_webhooks + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_git_accounts_schema + test_git_accounts_crud` 134/134 passed (30 PG-live skips); broader sweep `pytest test_integration_settings + test_integration_settings_emit + test_multi_repo + test_git_auth + test_repo_ingest` 107+177 passed. `test_webhooks.py` 31 pre-existing fail (`pool-init fixture issue`, git-stash-verified predates row 5-7 — same failures the 5-6 HANDOFF entry called out). **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` 對 5 prod files + 2 test files 0 真命中（唯一字串匹配是 `_fake_get_conn` 在新 test 內，FastAPI dependency-override fixture 名 — 與 legacy `_conn()` compat-wrapper 無關）。**Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**：0 新 module-globals；GerritClient singleton 已是 stateless（每 op 透過 inline-import 找 resolver、無 cache）；`get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` 也 stateless、與 `get_credential_registry_async`（每 worker 從同 PG pool 讀同 row set 或從同 Settings 推導同 shim）共享一致性保證。**Read-after-write audit**：0 新 write path — 只重導 read。已有的 LRU touch (Phase-5-3) 是 best-effort、resolver 行為不變。**Scope 紀律**：嚴格只完成 row 5-7 — 0 行 JIRA (5-8) / 0 行 UI rewrite (5-9) / 0 行 deprecation (5-10) / 0 行 soak (5-11) / 0 行 OAuth (5-12)。`backend/agents/tools.py` `settings.gerrit_enabled` master-switch 4 sites 完全不動（不是 credential）；`gerrit_replication_targets` scalar 完全不動（不是 account）。**Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests 綠；pool 路徑在 deploy 後立即生效；目前 git_accounts 表內 5-5 auto-migration 在 lifespan startup 跑出來的 `ga-legacy-gerrit-*` row 接管所有 Gerrit op，行為對 single-instance deployment 等價（resolver→default→legacy shim → settings.gerrit_*）。**Next gate**: dev-only 維持到 5-9 (UI) 或 5-11 (soak)；Phase 5 整體要到 5-9 + 5-11 才 flip deployed-active. **Rollback**: revert this commit — 無 schema / 無 data 變化；call sites 退回直接讀 settings.gerrit_*；新 `set_reviewer` op 無既有 caller 可 break（5-7 spec 加的、後續 5-9 UI 才 wire-up）。 -->
  - [x] **5-8 Call-site sweep — JIRA paths**：`backend/issue_tracker.py` 的 `_parse_jira_issue_url` + `settings.notification_jira_token` 改走新 registry (`pick_account_for_url(issue_url, platform='jira')`)；驗 multi-tenant 下 A tenant 的 JIRA credentials 不會 leak 到 B tenant 的 webhook 回應；status transition + webhook secret 兩路都 covered <!-- 2026-04-24 Phase-5-8 shipped: 3 prod files ported + 1 new resolver branch + 1 legacy-shim extension + 1 new test file (16 tests) + 3 existing test fixtures updated. **Ported call sites**: (1) `backend/issue_tracker.py::_sync_jira` — status-transition path swaps `settings.notification_jira_token` for the multi-account registry chain `pick_account_for_url(issue_url)` → `pick_default("jira")` with a mandatory platform post-filter (`account.get("platform") != "jira"`) so a catch-all `url_patterns` match on a non-jira row falls through to `pick_default('jira')` instead of leaking e.g. a github token to a jira API call; resolved `account.instance_url` wins over the URL-parsed host for both the list-transitions GET and the POST transition URL (multi-instance JIRA routing). (2) `backend/issue_tracker.py::_comment_jira` — same resolver chain + post-filter + instance_url preference so PAT rotation via Phase-5-4 CRUD takes effect without restart. (3) `backend/routers/webhooks.py::jira_webhook` — HMAC bearer verify now reads through `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async("", "jira")` (empty host because JIRA bearer auth has no HMAC-over-body signal, so resolver jumps straight to `pick_default('jira')` + scalar tail); `try/except` wraps resolver with `settings.jira_webhook_secret` fallback so shim-mode / pool-hiccup still authenticates single-instance deployments. **Resolver extensions**: (4) `backend/git_credentials.py::get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` grew a `platform == "jira"` branch in the scalar-fallback chain (alongside gerrit/github/gitlab) so `jira_webhook` can call the helper uniformly. (5) `backend/git_credentials.py::_build_registry` now synthesises a `default-jira` virtual row from `notification_jira_*` scalars (token + url + project + webhook_secret, `is_default=True`) so shim-mode `pick_default("jira")` works without every caller carrying its own scalar-fallback branch; pool-mode deployments get the real row from `git_accounts` via the row 5-5 auto-migration (`ga-legacy-jira-*`) instead. **Intentionally NOT touched** (per row 5-8 scope): `backend/issue_tracker._detect_platform_from_issue_url` keeps its `settings.notification_jira_url` / `settings.gitlab_url` hostname hints — that's URL classification for routing decisions, not credential lookup, and mirrors 5-7's decision to leave `git_auth.detect_platform`'s `settings.gerrit_ssh_host` read in place; `backend/routers/integration.py::_test_jira` probe button + `backend/jira_adapter.py::build_default_jira_adapter` stay scalar-reading for row 5-9/5-10 scope (UI rewrite + deprecation); `settings.notification_jira_project` + `notification_jira_url` remain in Settings as configuration knobs (row 5-10). **Tests**: new `backend/tests/test_phase5_8_call_site_sweep.py` 16 顆 — 4 `_sync_jira` (happy path resolver token + error without token + instance_url override wins over URL host + platform post-filter blocks cross-platform leak) / 2 `_comment_jira` (happy path + error without token) / 4 `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async` JIRA branch (platform default match + scalar fallback + **tenant isolation test: tenant-A's secret invisible to tenant-B lookup and vice versa** via `tenant_id` kwarg scope + per-platform filtering against gerrit-row-on-same-host) / 4 `jira_webhook` integration via TestClient (registry secret authenticates + wrong secret 401 + 503 when no secret + scalar fallback when resolver raises) / 2 `_build_registry` shim (synthesises default-jira row when scalar set + omits when no scalar). Updated 3 existing test fixtures to zero out `notification_jira_*` in their `settings` mocks (MagicMock's auto-generated truthy defaults triggered the new JIRA virtual-row synthesis during adjacent tests): `test_git_credentials_phase5_2.py::_empty_settings_mock`, `test_git_credentials_phase5_3.py` (2 patching loops in touch-skip tests), `test_phase5_6_call_site_sweep.py` (2 get_token_for_url regression guards). **Verification**: `pytest backend/tests/test_phase5_8_call_site_sweep.py` 16/16 passed in 0.39s; Phase-5 neighbour sweep `pytest test_git_credentials_phase5_2/5_3 + test_phase5_6/7/8_call_site_sweep + test_legacy_credential_migration + test_git_accounts_schema + test_git_accounts_crud` 127/127 passed (30 PG-live skips); broader JIRA/webhook neighbour `pytest test_external_webhooks + test_jira_adapter + test_integration_settings + test_orchestrator_gateway` 156/156 passed. **Pre-commit fingerprint grep** `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` 對 4 touched files (issue_tracker.py + routers/webhooks.py + git_credentials.py + test file) 0 命中 — **FINGERPRINT-CLEAN**. **Module-global audit (SOP Step 1, qualified answer #1)**: 0 new module-globals; call sites inline-import resolver; shim's existing `_CREDENTIALS_CACHE` remains per-worker (each worker derives same value from same Settings source, cross-worker coherent by construction). **Read-after-write audit**: 0 new write path — only read redirection — no serialisation→parallel behavior change. **Cross-tenant isolation contract**: the test `test_jira_tenant_isolation_via_registry_scope` explicitly asserts that `get_webhook_secret_for_host_async("", "jira", tenant_id="t-A")` returns only tenant-A's secret, and the inverse for t-B, proving the `WHERE tenant_id = $1` filter in the pool-backed path is load-bearing. **Scope discipline**: strictly row 5-8 only — 0 UI rewrite (5-9) / 0 deprecation (5-10) / 0 soak (5-11) / 0 OAuth (5-12); `_test_jira` probe + `jira_adapter` left for row 5-9/5-10; `_detect_platform_from_issue_url` untouched (classification, not credential). **Production status: dev-only** — code merged + tests 綠; on empty-`git_accounts` deployments the legacy shim's new default-jira virtual row makes `pick_default('jira')` behave identically to pre-5-8 `settings.notification_jira_token` reads, so this row ships safely before row 5-5 auto-migration runs. **Next gate**: dev-only until row 5-9 (UI) or 5-11 (soak); Phase 5 overall flips to deployed-active only at 5-9 + 5-11. **Rollback**: revert this commit — no schema / no data changes; call sites revert to direct `settings.notification_jira_*` reads; shim's default-jira virtual row disappears. -->
  - [ ] **5-9 UI rewrite — `AccountManagerSection`**：取代 `integration-settings.tsx::MultipleInstancesSection`；每個 account 一 row（platform icon + label + username + host + url_patterns + default ⭐ + test status）；新增 form 支援 github / gitlab / gerrit / jira 四個 platform 分頁；token input 有「test before save」按鈕 (call `POST /git-accounts/{id}/test`)；delete 有 confirm + 警告「仍有 repo 依賴這個 account？」(對 url_patterns 做反查)；default 切換一鍵；legacy `github_token_map` 仍顯示但標「Legacy (will auto-migrate on next login)」
  - [ ] **5-10 Deprecation path + docs**：legacy scalar fields (`github_token` / `gitlab_token` / `gerrit_url` 等) 在 `Settings` 標 `deprecated=True`，運行時 read 仍 OK 但寫入走 audit warn；`docs/ops/git_credentials.md` 更新 runbook（新增 account / rotate / disable / delete / 查哪個 repo 用哪個 account）；`docs/phase-5-multi-account/02-migration-runbook.md` 給 operator 遷移 SOP
  - [ ] **5-11 Soak + security audit**：3 個 github.com account + 2 個 gitlab.com + 2 個 gerrit + 1 個 JIRA real-credential 實測 clone/push/PR/issue/webhook 全路徑；token rotation drill（rotate 一個 account 的 token，驗仍運作 + audit 鏈有 trace）；per-tenant 隔離測試（A tenant 的 credential B tenant 看不到）；legacy migration dry-run on staging
  - [ ] **5-12 （optional follow-up）OAuth flow**：PAT 是 MVP，OAuth 2.0 (GitHub App install / GitLab OAuth2 / JIRA OAuth) 是後續升級；目前先不做、但 data model 要留 `auth_type TEXT DEFAULT 'pat'` 欄位 + code_verifier JSON 欄位 for 未來用

- **Phase 5b**: LLM API key persistence — 把 `anthropic_api_key` / `google_api_key` / `openai_api_key` / `xai_api_key` / `groq_api_key` / `deepseek_api_key` / `together_api_key` / `openrouter_api_key` 從記憶體搬到加密 DB table，跟 Phase 5 共用 `secret_store` Fernet + per-tenant 模型 <!-- 2026-04-22 源起：operator 在 LLM PROVIDERS 填入 Google API key 按 SAVE & APPLY 發現「沒反應」，fix 落在 `e1d2e3a4`（refetch providers + inline banner 顯示 applied/rejected 欄位 + 明載「runtime-only」caveat）。但 UI 修完只是讓「存了就看得到」，真正的設計債還在：`PUT /runtime/settings` 只在 process 記憶體 `setattr(settings, key, value)`、`docker compose restart backend-a` 一下就蒸發；operator 期待 API key 應該持久。**為何現在的 in-memory 夠不夠用**：開發 / 個人 dev deploy 勉強可用（key 寫進 `.env` 手動維護）、但只要 operator 需要從 UI 輪換 key、rolling restart / rollback deploy 時 key survive、或者未來多 tenant 各自帶 key — 這模型就不夠了。**跟 Phase 5 的關係**：同樣的 pattern（encrypted column via secret_store Fernet、per-tenant RLS、audit chain、runtime migration from legacy `.env`），只是 domain 是 LLM provider 而不是 git forge。建議跟 Phase 5 共享 infra：不另開 Fernet / audit plumbing、不另寫 migration 樣板、不另寫 UI 基底元件。**牽涉面積**：8 個 provider API key scalar (anthropic/google/openai/xai/groq/deepseek/together/openrouter) + `ollama_base_url` (not secret 但一起搬)，~6-10 個 py 檔 consumer（`agents/llm.py::list_providers` + `get_llm`、`routers/integration.py` 的 `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` 白名單 + `PUT /settings` handler、`routers/health.py` readyz 檢查、`config.py` deprecation + legacy read path），UI 改動集中在 `integration-settings.tsx::LLM PROVIDERS` section（~10 個 input row + save handler → 改 call 新 endpoint）。估 **4-6 commits / 1-2 sessions**，比 Phase 5 小（沒 url_patterns 邏輯、沒 4 platform × 多 call site 的 sweep 規模）。**風險**：(1) 誤把 legacy `.env` key 當成 auto-migrate 的來源時遷入錯 tenant 的 table — 需 kill-switch env 跟 Phase 5 一樣；(2) readyz probe 舊的 `settings.anthropic_api_key` 直接讀可能出現 cache stale — 統一走 resolver；(3) per-tenant 模型下 `/runtime/tokens` 統計要區分 tenant，不能像現在全 process 共享 — 跟 SP-8.1c 的 rate limit per_user 路徑有間接關聯。-->
  - [ ] **5b-1 Data model + alembic 0020 `llm_credentials` table**：schema `{id TEXT PK, tenant_id TEXT, provider TEXT, label TEXT, encrypted_value TEXT, metadata JSONB (base_url / org_id / scopes), is_default BOOL, enabled BOOL, created_at, updated_at, last_used_at}`；可沿用 Phase 5-1 的 `git_accounts` 結構複製貼上改 domain 名，省重設計時間；FK `tenant_id → tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE`；unique partial `(tenant_id, provider) WHERE is_default` 擋「同 tenant 同 provider 多 default」
  - [ ] **5b-2 Backend resolver refactor**：`backend/agents/llm.py::get_llm()` 原本 `api_key = getattr(settings, f"{provider}_api_key")` 改成 `api_key = await get_llm_credential(provider, tenant_id)`；resolver 讀 `llm_credentials` table → fallback 到 `settings.{provider}_api_key`（legacy `.env` read-only）→ fallback 到 missing→raise `LLMCredentialMissingError`；`list_providers()` 的 `configured` 欄位也走 resolver、不再直接 `bool(settings.{provider}_api_key)`
  - [ ] **5b-3 CRUD endpoint**：`GET /api/v1/llm-credentials` (list masked) / `POST` (create，body 進 Fernet 後寫 DB) / `PATCH {id}` / `DELETE {id}` / `POST {id}/test` (呼叫該 provider 的 ping API 驗 key 有效)；tenant RLS via `tenant_where_pg`；audit_log 每個 mutation；response 用 fingerprint (`sk-…abc4`) 不回 plain
  - [ ] **5b-4 UI rewrite — LLM PROVIDERS section**：`integration-settings.tsx` 的 LLM PROVIDERS 區塊現在打 `PUT /runtime/settings`、改成打 `POST /api/v1/llm-credentials` 或 `PATCH`；移除 banner 裡「runtime-only and will reset on backend restart」的 caveat（因為不再是 runtime-only）；每個 provider row 多加「rotate key」+「delete key」affordance；支援同一 provider 多 account（e.g. 兩組 Anthropic key 用 label 區分）
  - [ ] **5b-5 Legacy `.env` → `llm_credentials` auto-migration**：lifespan startup hook `migrate_legacy_llm_credentials_once()` — 偵測 `llm_credentials` 空 且 `settings.*_api_key` 任一有值 → 逐一建 row（tenant = `t-default`、label = `"Legacy .env migration"`、`is_default=true`）、寫 audit.log；idempotent；kill-switch env `OMNISIGHT_LLM_CREDENTIAL_MIGRATE=skip`；`.env` key 本身不刪、留給 operator 自己清
  - [ ] **5b-6 Deprecation + docs**：`config.py` 標 8 個 `{provider}_api_key` 為 `deprecated=True`；`PUT /runtime/settings` 的 `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` 把它們移除（逼 UI 改走新 endpoint）；`docs/ops/llm_credentials.md` runbook：新增 key / rotate / disable / 查哪個 tenant 用哪個 key / fallback chain 跟 per-tenant 互動；soak test（rotate anthropic key 驗仍運作 + audit 有 trace、backend restart 後 key 還在）

### A2. L1-05 Prod smoke test — 2 real DAGs end-to-end (#176)
- [x] Pick DAG #1: `compile-flash` template against host_native *(done: defined in `scripts/prod_smoke_test.py` — DAG_1_COMPILE_FLASH_HOST_NATIVE)*

- [x] Run dag1 via prod API + capture workflow_run ID *(PARTIAL 2026-04-24: dag1 submitted via `python3 scripts/prod_smoke_test.py https://ai.sora-dev.app --subset dag1`; `run_id=wf-1944b5b67e` + `plan_id=5` captured; dag2 skipped pending Finding #3 resolution. Auth flow (admin login → API key → Bearer) + DAG submission path validated. See `data/smoke-test-report-a2.md`.)*
- [~] Verify steps complete, artifacts persist, audit log hash-chain intact *(PARTIAL 2026-04-24: **audit hash-chain PASS** via `/api/v1/audit/verify`; **steps did NOT complete** — run stuck at `status=running step_count=0` for 13+ min with single 28.8s `gemma4:e4b` LLM call and no progress. Finding #3 in report = likely prod LLM orchestration hang, needs dedicated debug session — separate ticket, not a Blueprint blocker.)*
- [x] Attach run report to HANDOFF *(done 2026-04-24: `data/smoke-test-report-a2.md` 3 findings documented + HANDOFF 2026-04-24 entry written.)*
- [ ] **Follow-up ticket**: `auth_baseline._has_valid_session` 不認 Bearer token bug — API-key-only integration（包含這個 script）會被 baseline 401 在到達 handler 之前；workaround 是混合送 Cookie + Bearer；真修是 `auth_baseline` 加 `api_keys.validate_bearer` 檢查
- [x] ~~Follow-up ticket: 調查 prod LLM orchestration hang~~ *(ROOT CAUSE FOUND + RESOLVED 2026-04-24: Anthropic API credit balance 耗盡 → HTTP 400 `credit_low` → fallback silently 降到 gemma4:e4b 卡死。Operator 已充值 → Haiku 4.5 ping 回 HTTP 200 "Pong! 🏓" 8+10 tokens，primary path 恢復。詳見 `docs/ops/smoke-test-a2-2026-04-24.md` Finding #3 updated section.)*
- [ ] **Follow-up ticket**: `scripts/*.py` bulk UA audit — Cloudflare Bot Fight Mode 擋 `Python-urllib/*` default UA
- [ ] A2 full retry（`--subset both`）after all follow-ups 收尾（auth_baseline Bearer fix 完 + Phase F hard-error classification 完）— 低優先，下次 DAG submit 自然會走 Anthropic happy path
- [ ] **NEW Follow-up**: LLM fallback hard-error vs soft-fallback 區分（Finding #3 residual design flaw）→ **已 fold 到 Phase F BP.F.8-F.10**（見 ADR §Phase F）；operator 也建議在 Anthropic console 設 spend alert 避免再撞牆

## 🆐 Priority BP — Blueprint V2 (Enterprise Multi-Agent Software Factory)

> **ADR**：[`docs/design/blueprint-v2-implementation-plan.md`](docs/design/blueprint-v2-implementation-plan.md) — Accepted 2026-04-24
> **藍圖**：[`docs/design/enterprise-level-multi-agent-software-factory-architecture.md`](docs/design/enterprise-level-multi-agent-software-factory-architecture.md)
> **執行模式**：**單序不平行**（operator 決策 2026-04-24）
> **預估**：Window 0 ~7-9 週 / 主線 ~14-20 週 / 含 backlog 9-12 月 wall-clock
> **Window 0 順序**（operator-confirmed）：`Q.2-Q.8 → Phase 4 → Phase 5 → Phase 5b → Z → Y-prep`
> **Phase E**（GraphRAG / Neo4j）：**延後到 v1.0 後**
> **6 項已決策**：見 ADR §2

### BP.W0 — Window 0：TODO 收尾 + Blueprint 前置（~7-9 週）
> 此 Window 全部走訪既有 TODO，不開新工作；交叉指向原 Priority 章節
- [ ] **BP.W0.1** Priority Q.2-Q.8 Multi-device parity 收尾（~1.5 週）→ 見 Priority Q
- [ ] **BP.W0.2** TODO Phase 4 Dashboard polling consolidation（~1 週）→ 見 A3 sub-rows 4-1 ~ 4-6
- [ ] **BP.W0.3** TODO Phase 5 Multi-account forge integrations（~2-3 週）→ 見 A3 sub-rows 5-1 ~ 5-12
- [ ] **BP.W0.4** TODO Phase 5b LLM API key persistence（~1 週）→ 見 A3 sub-rows 5b-1 ~ 5b-6
- [ ] **BP.W0.5** Priority Z LLM Provider Observability（~3.5d）→ 見 Priority Z
- [ ] **BP.W0.6** Y-prep Gerrit+JIRA hardening（~2.5d）→ 見 Priority Y-prep

- [ ] BP.A.4 `backend/templates/review.py` — Pydantic ReviewTemplate（強制 audit_type="advisory" + requires_human_signoff=true 的 Auxiliary disclaimer）
- [ ] BP.A.5 `backend/cognitive_load.py` — fan-in / fan-out / mock-limit 量化器
- [ ] BP.A.6 `backend/template_validator.py` — FastAPI 驗證中介層（Pydantic ValidationError → 認知懲罰 prompt）
- [ ] BP.A.7 `backend/tests/test_templates.py` — ~120 unit test

### BP.F — Mixed-mode Model Mapping + Hard-error / Soft-fallback 分類（~1.5 週）
> 前置 BP.B；混合三態旗標 enforce/warn/advisory。**2026-04-24 擴充**：加入 hard-error vs soft-fallback 分類（緣於 A2 smoke test Finding #3）
- [ ] BP.F.1 `backend/agents/llm.py::get_llm()` 加 mapping guardrail（~50 LOC）
- [ ] BP.F.2 `backend/guild_model_map.py` — 21 Guild 預設 model 對照表
- [ ] BP.F.3 `configs/model_mapping.yaml` — operator 可改寫
- [ ] BP.F.4 env knob `OMNISIGHT_MODEL_MAPPING_MODE=enforce|warn|advisory`
- [ ] BP.F.5 Prometheus metric `omnisight_model_mapping_violation_total{guild_id,mode}`
- [ ] BP.F.6 fallback chain per Guild（避免 provider outage 整條停擺）
- [ ] BP.F.7 `backend/tests/test_model_mapping.py` — ~40 test
- [ ] **BP.F.8** `backend/llm_error_classifier.py` — LLM error → `{hard, soft}` 分類器
  - **hard**：`credit_low` / `quota_exceeded` / `auth_failed` / `permission_denied`（需 operator 介入）
  - **soft**：`rate_limited` / `network_timeout` / `503 service_unavailable`（自動 fallback OK）
  - 每 provider 獨立對照表（Anthropic / OpenAI / Google / xAI / Groq / DeepSeek / Together / Ollama）
- [ ] **BP.F.9** Notification 整合：hard-error 觸發 L3 Jira (`LLM-HARD-ERROR-{provider}-{ts}`) + L4 PagerDuty (P2) + **orchestrator gateway refuse new DAG submit**（避免 silent degrade 到 slow fallback）
- [ ] **BP.F.10** `backend/tests/test_llm_error_classifier.py` — ~25 test：每 provider 至少 2 hard + 2 soft 對照 + fallback chain happy path + hard-error refuse-submit path

### B12. UX-CF-TUNNEL-WIZARD — Cloudflare Tunnel 一鍵自動配置（新）
> 目標：取代現行手動 4 步驟（`cloudflared tunnel login` → `create` → `route dns` → 編輯 `config.yml`）。使用者在 UI 只輸入 CF API Token + 選 Zone + 填 hostname，其餘由系統自動完成。

**Backend**
- [x] `backend/cloudflare_client.py`：CF API v4 wrapper（tunnels / dns / zones / accounts）+ 錯誤映射（401 invalid token / 403 missing scope / 409 conflict / 429 rate limit）
- [x] `backend/routers/cloudflare_tunnel.py`：
  - `POST /api/v1/cloudflare/validate-token` — 驗 token 並回傳可用 accounts
  - `GET  /api/v1/cloudflare/zones?account_id=` — 列使用者可選 zone
  - `POST /api/v1/cloudflare/provision` — 建 tunnel + ingress config + DNS CNAME（冪等、失敗自動回滾）
  - `GET  /api/v1/cloudflare/status` — tunnel 連線狀態（connector 是否 up、DNS propagation）
  - `POST /api/v1/cloudflare/rotate-token`
  - `DELETE /api/v1/cloudflare/tunnel` — teardown（刪 tunnel + DNS record）
- [x] 使用 connector **token 模式**（`cloudflared tunnel run --token <T>`）避免 credentials.json 檔案管理
- [x] 整合 `backend/secret_store.py`：token at-rest 加密、UI 只見 fingerprint；寫入 Phase 53 audit_log（`cf_tunnel.provision` / `.rotate` / `.delete`）
- [x] systemd 橋接：sudoers NOPASSWD rule **僅限** `systemctl {start,stop,restart,status} cloudflared.service`；或 container 模式用 sidecar 免 systemd
- [x] 冪等：provision 失敗要清掉已建 tunnel / DNS（plan → apply 兩段式，或 try/rollback 記錄）

**Frontend**
- [x] `components/omnisight/cloudflare-tunnel-setup.tsx`：多步 wizard
  - Step 1 API Token 輸入 + "如何建立 token" 連結（預設 scope 清單）
  - Step 2 驗證 token → 列 account / zone 選單
  - Step 3 填 hostname（預設 `omnisight.<zone>` 與 `api.omnisight.<zone>`）
  - Step 4 Review → 「一鍵 Provision」按鈕
  - Step 5 即時狀態（SSE）：tunnel 建立 ✓ / DNS ✓ / connector online ✓ / health probe ✓
- [x] 既有 tunnel 偵測：顯示現況 + rotate / teardown 按鈕
- [x] 錯誤 UI：token scope 不足時明列缺少哪幾個 permission

**測試**
- [x] Mock CF API（`respx`）涵蓋：invalid token / missing scope / existing tunnel / DNS 已存在 / rate limit / 部分成功回滾
- [x] 整合測試：provision → status → teardown 完整循環
- [O] E2E（Playwright）：wizard 四步流程 + 錯誤路徑

**文件 & 安全**
- [x] `docs/operations/cloudflare_tunnel_wizard.md`：使用者操作步驟 + token scope 建議
- [x] 更新 `docs/operations/deployment.md`：提示 wizard 路徑並保留 CLI 手動模式備援
- [x] 安全檢查：token 不得出現於日誌 / SSE payload / error 訊息

**預估**：~6 day（BE 2 + FE 1.5 + systemd 橋接 1 + audit/rollback/test/docs 1.5）

### B13. FUI Error Pages + Bootstrap UX 優化（#339）— 🔴 優先

> 背景：目前 400/500 系列錯誤頁面使用 Next.js 預設白底黑字，與 FUI 暗色掃描線風格完全不搭。Bootstrap 未完成時 API 回 503 JSON，工程師能看懂，但一般使用者看到「503 Service Unavailable」會以為系統壞了。需要**雙層 UX**：友善的人類訊息 + 可展開的技術詳情。

**Part A — Bootstrap Required 專用頁面**
- [x] `app/setup-required/page.tsx`：全屏 FUI 風格「系統需要完成初始設定」頁面
  - [x] 友善訊息：「歡迎！這是您第一次使用 OmniSight，只需幾分鐘即可完成基礎配置。」
  - [x] CTA 按鈕：「▶ 開始設定」→ 導向 `/bootstrap`
  - [x] 可展開「技術詳情」區塊：顯示 503 JSON 內容 + backend 版本 + 各 gate 狀態（admin_password / llm_provider / cf_tunnel / smoke）
  - [x] FUI 風格：暗色背景 + 掃描線動畫 + neural-grid 元素 + Orbitron 標題字型
- [x] `lib/api.ts` 攔截器：API response `error === "bootstrap_required"` → 不走 error toast → `window.location = "/setup-required"`
- [x] `middleware.ts`（或 `proxy.ts`）：未登入 + 503 bootstrap_required → redirect 到 `/setup-required`（不是 `/login`）

**Part B — FUI 錯誤頁面（400/500 系列）**
- [x] `app/not-found.tsx`（404）：「找不到此頁面」+ 回首頁按鈕 + 展開區：requested URL
- [x] `app/error.tsx`（Client error boundary）：「發生錯誤」+ 重試按鈕 + 展開區：error.message + stack（prod 隱藏 stack）
- [x] `app/global-error.tsx`（Root layout crash）：最外層 fallback，minimal FUI 風格
- [x] `components/omnisight/error-page.tsx`：共用 FUI error 頁面元件，支援：
  - [x] `code`（400/401/403/404/500/502/503）
  - [x] `friendlyMessage`（人類可讀的友善訊息）
  - [x] `technicalDetail`（工程師細節，預設折疊）
  - [x] `actions`（按鈕列表：回首頁 / 登入 / 重試 / 回報問題）
  - [x] FUI 風格：暗色 + 大號 error code + 掃描線 + 微弱脈衝動畫
- [x] 各 HTTP code 的友善訊息對照：
  - [x] 400：「請求格式有誤，請檢查輸入後重試」
  - [x] 401：「登入已過期，請重新登入」+ 登入按鈕
  - [x] 403：「您沒有此頁面的存取權限」+ 聯繫管理員提示
  - [x] 404：「此頁面不存在或已移除」+ 回首頁按鈕
  - [x] 500：「系統發生內部錯誤，我們已收到通知」+ error trace ID
  - [x] 502：「後端服務暫時不可用，請稍後重試」+ 自動重試 countdown
  - [x] 503：「系統維護中」或「設定未完成」（依 error.error 欄位區分）

**Part C — API Error 統一攔截**
- [x] `lib/api.ts` 全域 error handler：
  - [x] 503 `bootstrap_required` → redirect `/setup-required`（不 toast）
  - [x] 401 → redirect `/login?next=<current_path>`（不 toast）
  - [x] 403 → toast warning「權限不足」
  - [x] 500 → toast error「系統錯誤」+ 展開區顯示 trace ID
  - [x] 502/503 其他 → toast warning「服務暫時不可用」+ 自動重試
  - [x] 網路斷線 → toast info「網路連線中斷，嘗試重新連線...」+ retry indicator

- 預估：**2 day**（Error page 元件 0.5d + 7 個 code 頁面 0.5d + API 攔截器 0.5d + Bootstrap UX 0.5d）

### B14. UX 改善 — Bootstrap Wizard + Git Forge 設定 + Integration 頁面優化（#340）

> 背景：deep audit 發現 6 個 UX 問題影響首次使用者和 Git forge 整合使用者。Bootstrap wizard 不包含 Git forge 設定、多 repo token map 無 UI、Gerrit 設定無引導、Integration 頁面欄位過多、Settings 缺 connection test。這些問題不擋上線但會影響使用體驗。

**Part A — Bootstrap Wizard 加入 Git Forge 設定步驟（選填）**
- [x] Bootstrap wizard 在 Step 3（CF Tunnel）後加 Step 3.5「Git Forge 設定（選填）」
- [x] Step 3.5 UI：三選一 tab（GitHub / GitLab / Gerrit）+ 「跳過，稍後設定」按鈕
- [x] GitHub tab：token 輸入 + 「Test Connection」按鈕 → 呼叫 GitHub API 驗證 → 成功顯示 user/org name
- [x] GitLab tab：URL + token 輸入 + 「Test Connection」→ 顯示 GitLab instance version
- [x] Gerrit tab：URL + SSH host/port 輸入 + 「Test SSH」→ 驗證 SSH 連線 + Gerrit version
- [x] 「跳過」不影響 bootstrap finalization（Git forge 非必要 gate）
- 預估：**1 day**（Step 3.5 slot 0.2d + 三-tab UI 0.2d + GitHub test 0.2d + GitLab test 0.1d + Gerrit SSH test 0.2d + skip-non-blocking 0.1d = 1d closed-loop）

**Part B — Multi-repo Token Map UI**
- [x] Settings → Integration → Git 區塊新增「Multiple Instances」展開區
- [x] 「Add GitHub Instance」按鈕 → 表單：hostname（如 `github.enterprise.com`）+ token
- [x] 「Add GitLab Instance」按鈕 → 表單：URL + token
- [x] 列表顯示所有已設定的 instance + 每個有「Test」/「Remove」按鈕
- [x] 儲存時寫入 `OMNISIGHT_GITHUB_TOKEN_MAP` / `OMNISIGHT_GITLAB_TOKEN_MAP`（JSON 格式）
- [x] 後端 API：`GET/PUT /api/v1/settings/git/token-map` → 讀寫 token map（token 遮罩顯示）
- 預估：**1 day**

**Part C — Gerrit Setup Wizard（獨立引導）**
- [x] Settings → Integration → Gerrit 區塊加「Setup Wizard」按鈕 → 開啟 modal 引導
- [x] Step 1：輸入 Gerrit URL + SSH host/port → 「Test Connection」驗證
- [x] Step 2：SSH key 設定引導（顯示公鑰 → 提示貼到 Gerrit Settings → SSH Keys）
- [x] Step 3：`merger-agent-bot` 帳號設定引導（說明如何建 bot 帳號 + 設定 group）
- [x] Step 4：submit-rule 驗證（呼叫 Gerrit API 檢查 project.config 是否含雙簽 +2 rule）
- [x] Step 5：webhook 設定引導（顯示 webhook URL + secret → 提示貼到 Gerrit）
- [x] 完成後寫入 config + 顯示「Gerrit 整合已啟用」
- 預估：**1.5 day**

**Part D — Integration Settings 頁面分 tab**
- [x] 現行 Settings → Integration 所有欄位擠在一頁 → 改為分 tab：
  - [x] Tab 1「Git」：GitHub token + GitLab token/URL + SSH key + Multi-instance map
  - [x] Tab 2「Gerrit」：Gerrit Code Review 全部設定 + Setup Wizard 入口
  - [x] Tab 3「Webhooks」：GitHub/GitLab/Gerrit/Jira webhook secrets + 狀態指示
  - [x] Tab 4「CI/CD」：GitHub Actions / Jenkins / GitLab CI 開關 + 設定
- [x] 每個 tab 頂部顯示 connection status badge（✅ connected / ⚠️ not configured / ❌ error）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**Part E — Connection Test 按鈕**
- [x] 每個 Git forge 設定區塊加「Test Connection」按鈕
- [x] GitHub：`GET /user` → 顯示帳號名 + scope
- [x] GitLab：`GET /api/v4/version` → 顯示版本
- [x] Gerrit：SSH `gerrit version` → 顯示版本
- [x] Jira：`GET /rest/api/2/serverInfo` → 顯示版本
- [x] 測試結果即時顯示在按鈕旁（✅ / ❌ + 錯誤訊息）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**B14 總預估**：**4.5 day**

### B15. Skill Lazy Loading — Agent Token 效率優化（#350）

> 背景：目前 agent 每次啟動都把完整 role skill 塞進 system prompt（~50K chars = ~12.5K tokens）。Google Android CLI + Skills 的「Progressive Disclosure」模式證明只送 metadata → 按需載入可減少 70% token 用量。此優化影響所有 agent（不只 Mobile），是橫切面效率改善。
>
> 不碰 O 系列（O0-O10 全部不動）——只改 prompt 組裝層。

- [x] `backend/prompt_registry.py` 新增 `get_skill_metadata(path) -> dict`：回傳 `{name, description, trigger_condition, token_cost}` 不含完整 body
- [x] `backend/prompt_registry.py` 新增 `get_skill_full(path) -> str`：回傳完整 skill content（按需呼叫）
- [x] `backend/prompt_loader.py` `build_system_prompt()` 改為兩階段：
  - [x] Phase 1（啟動時）：只注入所有 skill 的 metadata list（~500 chars total vs 現在 ~50K chars）
  - [x] Phase 2（ReAct loop 中）：依 CATC `domain_context` + 使用者 prompt 自動匹配 → 載入相關 skill 完整內容
- [x] `backend/agents/nodes.py` ReAct loop 加 skill-on-demand 邏輯：agent 輸出 `[LOAD_SKILL: skill_name]` → system 注入完整 skill → 繼續推理
- [x] Feature flag：`OMNISIGHT_SKILL_LOADING=eager|lazy`（預設 `eager` 保持向後相容，切 `lazy` 啟用新模式）
- [x] A/B test 驗證：同一 task 用 eager vs lazy 跑，比較完成率 + token 用量 + response 品質
- [x] Metrics：`skill_load_total{mode}` / `skill_token_saved_total` / `skill_load_latency_ms`
- 預估：**1.5 day**

### B16. Role Skill 強化 — Cherry-pick Agency-Agents + Pattern Upgrade（#353）— 🔴 優先

> 背景：開源 [agency-agents](https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents)（MIT License, 144+ agents）有 3 個 OmniSight 缺乏的設計 pattern（personality-driven / success metrics / per-role critical rules）和 5+ 個我們完全沒有的高價值 role。cherry-pick 補齊後，agent 行為一致性 + 產出品質 + 自我驗收能力都會提升。
>
> 不碰既有程式碼——只新增/修改 `configs/roles/*.md` skill 檔案。

**Part A — Cherry-pick 高價值 Role Skills（缺失補齊）**
- [x] `configs/roles/security-engineer.md`：從 agency-agents 的 Security Engineer 轉換——自動 security review（XSS / injection / auth bypass / CSP 違規 / secret 洩漏偵測）。整合 S2 系列 + PEP Gateway 使用
- [x] `configs/roles/code-reviewer.md`：從 agency-agents 的 Code Reviewer 轉換——通用 code review（非只 merge conflict）。review checklist + 效能 / 可讀性 / 安全性 / 測試覆蓋 4 維度評分。搭配 O6 Merger Agent 作為 pre-review 階段
- [x] `configs/roles/software-architect.md`：架構決策框架——trade-off 分析模板 + ADR（Architecture Decision Record）自動生成 + 技術債評估
- [x] `configs/roles/sre.md`：Site Reliability Engineer——incident response SOP + runbook 自動生成 + SLO/SLI 定義 + post-mortem 模板。搭配 R0 PEP + R1 ChatOps
- [x] `configs/roles/technical-writer.md`：文件生成專家——API docs / user guide / changelog / migration guide 品質標準 + 多語言模板
- [x] `configs/roles/database-optimizer.md`：SQL 效能分析 + index 建議 + query plan 解讀 + slow query 偵測。搭配 G4 PostgreSQL
- 預估：**0.5 day**（轉換 + 調整格式 + 加入 OmniSight-specific context）

**Part B — 現有 19 個 Role Skills Pattern Upgrade**
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Personality section**：從「指令式」（你是 X 專家，請做 Y）升級為「人格式」（你是 X，有 N 年經驗，你的核心信念是 Z，你絕不會做 W）。讓 agent 行為更一致、更少脫軌
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Success Metrics section**：明確定義「什麼叫做成功完成」——例如 frontend-react：Lighthouse ≥ 90 + 0 a11y violation + 0 console error + bundle size ≤ budget
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Critical Rules section**：per-role 不可違反規則（比 CLAUDE.md L1 更精確）——例如 backend-python：never return 500 without logging trace_id、never use f-string SQL
- [x] 所有 role skill 加入 **Trigger Condition**（搭配 B15 Lazy Loading）：定義何時該載入此 skill（例如 `trigger: "使用者提到 React / component / 前端 / UI"`)
- 預估：**2 day**（19 個 role skills × ~1h each，可批次處理）

**Part C — Accessibility Auditor 強化 W5**
- [x] 比對 agency-agents 的 Accessibility Auditor 和現有 `web-a11y.md`
- [x] 補齊缺失項：focus order 驗證流程 + screen reader 測試腳本 + 色彩對比自動計算 + 動態內容 ARIA live region 檢查
- [x] 將強化後的 a11y skill 同時適用於 W（Web）+ V（Visual workspace）+ P（Mobile a11y）
- 預估：**0.5 day**

**B16 總預估**：**3 day**

- [x] PDL interpreters: PCL / PostScript / PDF (via Ghostscript)

- [x] Print queue + spooler integration
- [x] Unit test: round-trip PDF → raster → PDL → output

### C21. L4-CORE-21 Enterprise web stack pattern (#242) — **highest leverage for Layer C**
- [x] Auth: Next-Auth + optional SSO plug (LDAP/SAML/OIDC)
- [x] RBAC: role/permission schema + policy middleware
- [x] Audit: every write → audit_log (reuse Phase 53 hash chain)
- [x] Reports: tabular + chart via Tremor / shadcn
- [x] i18n: next-intl scaffold with zh/en bundles
- [x] Multi-tenant: tenant_id column + row-level security
- [x] Import/export: CSV/XLSX/JSON round-trip
- [x] Workflow engine: state machine + approval chain
- [x] Reference implementation (acts as template for SW-WEB-*)

### C22. L4-CORE-22 Barcode/scanning SDK abstraction (#243)
- [x] Unified `BarcodeScanner` interface
- [x] Vendor adapters: Zebra SNAPI / Honeywell SDK / Datalogic SDK / Newland SDK
- [x] Symbology support: UPC/EAN/Code128/QR/DataMatrix/PDF417/Aztec
- [x] Decode modes: HID wedge / SPP / API
- [x] Unit test with pre-captured frame samples

### C23. L4-CORE-23 Depth / 3D sensing pipeline (#253)
- [x] ToF sensor driver abstraction (Sony IMX556 / Melexis MLX75027)
- [x] Structured light capture + decoder
- [x] Stereo rectification + disparity (OpenCV SGBM)
- [x] Point cloud: PCL + Open3D wrappers
- [x] ICP registration + SLAM hooks
- [x] Unit test: known scene → expected point count + bounds

### C24. L4-CORE-24 Machine vision & industrial imaging framework (#254)
- [x] GenICam driver abstraction
- [x] GigE Vision transport (aravis or mvIMPACT)
- [x] USB3 Vision transport
- [x] Hardware trigger + encoder sync
- [x] Multi-camera calibration (checkerboard + bundle adjustment)
- [x] Line-scan support
- [x] PLC integration (Modbus/OPC-UA via CORE-13)

### C25. L4-CORE-25 Motion control / G-code / CNC abstraction (#255)
- [x] G-code interpreter (subset: G0/G1/G28/M104/M109/M140)
- [x] Stepper driver abstraction (TMC2209 / A4988 / DRV8825)
- [x] Heater + PID loop (hotend + bed)
- [x] Endstop handling + homing
- [x] Thermal runaway safety shutoff
- [x] Unit test: G-code sequence → expected motion trace

### C26. L4-CORE-26 HMI embedded web UI framework (#261)
- [x] Bundle size budget per platform profile (flash partition aware; CI hard-fail on 超標)
- [x] Constrained generator（whitelist Preact / vanilla JS / lit-html；禁 CDN；inline fonts + CSS；禁 analytics）
- [x] Backend binding generator：NL + HAL schema → fastcgi/mongoose/civetweb C handler 骨架 + 對應 JS client
- [x] QEMU + headless Chromium 驗證 harness（`scripts/simulate.sh` 新增 `hmi` track）
- [x] IEC 62443 security baseline gate（CSP / XSS / CSRF / session storage / auth flow）
- [x] Embedded browser ABI matrix（aarch64/armv7/riscv64 × 凍結版 Chromium/WebKit 相容性表）
- [x] i18n 框架（與 D-series doc templates 共用語言池，en/zh-TW/ja/zh-CN 4 語言起步）
- [x] 共用 HMI component library（network / OTA / logs viewer — 供 D2 IPCam / D8 Router / D9 5G-GW / D17 Industrial-PC / D24 POS / D25 Kiosk 共用）
- [x] Pluggable LLM backend（Opus 4.7 Design Tool / Ollama 本地 / rule-based fallback，沿用 `OMNISIGHT_LLM_PROVIDER`）
- [x] Unit + integration tests（generator / QEMU+Chromium / size budget gate）
