rollback frontend/backend，只要 frontend 不送 If-Match、backend 不強制會即時退化成 last-write-wins（但不建議、因為 409 就回不來了）。**Next checkbox**：Q.7 #2「Schema 四張表都加 `version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`」— 本 row 已同 commit ship。
- [x] Schema：以上 table 都加 `version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`，UPDATE 必 increment + `WHERE version = :old_version`。**Done 2026-04-24** — 本 row 已隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit (be35772a) ship，驗收於此 row 標記 [x]。具體落地點：(a) **Alembic migration** `backend/alembic/versions/0023_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` 對四張表 `tasks` / `npi_state` / `tenant_secrets` / `project_runs` 各跑一次 `ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0`；PG 走 `ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS`（native idempotent、可 rolling replay）、SQLite 走 `PRAGMA table_info(<tbl>)` 先 probe 再 ALTER（SQLite 不支援 IF NOT EXISTS on ADD COLUMN、手動冪等化）；column type 選 `INTEGER` 不 `BIGINT`（2**31 PATCHes 不 reachable、鏡射 J2 migration 0009_workflow_run_version 的 precedent）；`downgrade()` 刻意 no-op（丟 version column 會 silent 重啟 last-write-wins race + 破壞 in-flight If-Match clients、需要 hand-rolled 反向 migration 才回退）。(b) **SQLite-bootstrap mirror** `backend/db.py::_migrate` 行 193-198 新增四 `(tbl, "version", "INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0")` migration rows 讓 SQLite 測試路徑（`test_migrator_schema_coverage.py` 那類 drift guard）同步拿到 column。(c) **UPDATE-with-increment + WHERE old_version** 收斂進 `backend/optimistic_lock.py::bump_version_pg(conn, table, *, pk_col, pk_value, expected_version, updates)`（`optimistic_lock.py:125-193`）：asyncpg `$N` 占位符動態拼 SET、尾部強制塞 `version = version + 1` + `WHERE <pk> = $K AND version = $(K+1)` + `RETURNING version`；miss 時 re-SELECT `SELECT version FROM <tbl> WHERE <pk>=$1` 區分 404（row 不存在 → `current_version=None`）vs 409（drifted → `current_version=<int>`）；一 round-trip 不 rowcount gymnastics。**四 handler 落點**：`backend/routers/tasks.py::update_task` 用 `bump_version_pg(conn, "tasks", pk_col="id", pk_value=task_id, expected_version=parse_if_match(if_match), updates={...})`；`backend/routers/system.py::update_npi_state` 因為 singleton row (`id='current'`) 語義走專用 `backend/db.py::save_npi_state_versioned(data, expected_version)` 實作等價 SQL `UPDATE npi_state SET data=$1, version=version+1 WHERE id='current' AND version=$2 RETURNING version`（first-write 走 `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING` + re-SELECT fallback）；`backend/routers/secrets.py::update_secret` 用 `bump_version_pg(conn, "tenant_secrets", pk_col="id", ...)`；`backend/routers/projects.py::patch_project_run` 用 `bump_version_pg(conn, "project_runs", pk_col="id", ...)`。**SOP Step 1 module-global audit**：本 row 純 schema/SQL 改動、無 module-global 引入（`bump_version_pg` 是 pure async 函式、state 全在 PG 合格答案 #2；migration 0023 是 DDL、執行一次就 freeze 合格答案 #1）。Read-after-write timing 已由 Q.7 #1 row cover（asyncio.gather 雙 PATCH 兩種 ordering 都落 409、loser 不會錯誤 200）。Q.4 #298 SSE scope policy N/A — schema 變更不 emit event。**SOP Step 3 pre-commit fingerprint grep**：`backend/alembic/versions/0023_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` / `backend/optimistic_lock.py` / `backend/db.py` 行 193-198 新增段跑 `_conn()` / `await conn.commit()` / `datetime('now')` / `VALUES (?, ...)` 四 fingerprint **零命中**（`bump_version_pg` 全用 asyncpg `$N`、migration 0023 用 `exec_driver_sql` 走 bind dialect 區分、db.py 新 4 row 只 literal column names）。**Tests**：本 checkbox 的 schema 面已由 `backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` (5-6) `bump_version_pg` direct-SQL 兩顆 test cover（happy-path bump → version=0→1 / concurrent stale expected → VersionConflict.current_version=1 / missing row → current_version=None）+ (7-22) 16 顆 HTTP-level 並發 PATCH `asyncio.gather` 驗 loser 真的 409（代表 UPDATE ... WHERE version = old_version 的 guard 正確命中）；drift guard `backend/tests/test_migrator_schema_coverage.py` **3 passed 1 skipped**（四張改寫表原本就在 `TABLES_IN_ORDER` + `version` 只是加 column、無新表 → 不觸 drift）。無 PG env 下 Q.7 suite **4 passed 18 skipped** clean-skip。**Production status: dev-only** — 純 schema migration，隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit deploy；`alembic upgrade head` 會 apply 0023（ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS 冪等、可 rolling）。**Next gate:** 與 Q.7 #1 同 gate — deployed-active 需 (1) `alembic upgrade head` + (2) backend image rebuild + (3) frontend build/image rebuild + (4) live smoke (兩 browser 同時 PATCH 同 task 驗一 200 一 409)。Rollback path：revert Q.7 #1 commit 即可，migration 0023 下為 no-op downgrade（ADD COLUMN 不回退、多餘 column 對舊 code 無害）。**Next checkbox**：Q.7 #3「Handler 驗 If-Match header 不符回 409 + body 帶 {current_version, your_version, hint}」— 亦已同 Q.7 #1 commit ship（`parse_if_match` / `raise_conflict` 兩 helper + 四 handler 全部落實）、待後續 row 標 [x]。
- [x] Handler 驗 `If-Match: <version>` header，不符回 409 + body 帶 `{current_version, your_version, hint}`。**Done 2026-04-24** — 本 row 已隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit (be35772a) ship，驗收於此 row 標記 [x]。具體落地於 `backend/optimistic_lock.py` 的兩顆 helper + 四顆 handler：(a) **`parse_if_match(if_match)`**（`optimistic_lock.py:71-95`）— 處理三種 shape：`None` → `HTTPException(428, "If-Match header required")`（J2 契約要求每筆 mutation 必帶 version、沒帶就拒、不 fall-through 成 last-write-wins）；非 int → `HTTPException(400, "If-Match must be an integer version")`；成功時 `int(if_match.strip().strip('"').strip())`，weak-ETag `"42"` / bare int `42` 兩格式都吃（前端 `lib/api.ts` 的 request helper 可送 quoted ETag 或純 int、server 不需要分支）。(b) **`raise_conflict(current_version, your_version, hint="另一裝置已修改，請重載", *, resource="")`**（`optimistic_lock.py:98-122`）— 固定 body shape `{"detail": {"current_version": N, "your_version": M, "hint": "...", "resource": "..."}}`、預設 hint 是 Traditional-Chinese operator-facing copy（Q.7 spec）、`resource` 讓前端 toast center 印不同標籤（`task` / `runtime_settings` / `secret` / `project_run`）；handler 要覆蓋 hint 可 override、baseline 統一方便前端 `use409Conflict` hook 消費（toast 三按鈕「重載 / 覆蓋 / 合併」的 default copy 由 hook 端填）。(c) **四 handler 落點**：① `backend/routers/tasks.py::update_task`（`tasks.py:158-246`）— `if_match: str | None = Header(None, alias="If-Match")` 參數 + 進函式第一步 `expected_version = parse_if_match(if_match)` + `bump_version_pg` miss 後 `except VersionConflict as conflict: raise_conflict(conflict.current_version, conflict.your_version, resource="task")`；② `backend/routers/secrets.py::update_secret`（`secrets.py:72,84,111-114`）— 同 pattern、`resource="secret"`；③ `backend/routers/system.py::update_npi_state`（`system.py:1533,1546,1559-1560`）— 同 pattern、`resource="runtime_settings"`、走專用 `save_npi_state_versioned` 再包 `VersionConflict` 轉 `raise_conflict`；④ `backend/routers/projects.py::patch_project_run`（`projects.py:63,79,95-101`）— 同 pattern、`resource="project_run"`。(d) **`VersionConflict` exception**（`optimistic_lock.py:47-68`）— 攜 `current_version` (post-write SELECT 拿到的 live 值、drift row 是 int / 不存在 row 是 None) + `your_version` (client 送的) + `resource` (table 名)、僅內部流通、handler 負責 translate 成 HTTP 409。**SOP Step 1 module-global audit**：本 row 純 helper + handler 既存 code audit、無新增 module-global；`parse_if_match` / `raise_conflict` 是 pure function（state 全在 HTTPException raise、合格答案 #1）、`VersionConflict` 是 Exception class（無 class-level state、合格答案 #1）。Read-after-write timing 已由 Q.7 #1 row cover。Q.4 #298 SSE scope policy N/A — 409 是 client↔server local、不 emit `workflow_updated`。**SOP Step 3 pre-commit fingerprint grep**：`backend/optimistic_lock.py` / `backend/routers/{tasks,secrets,system,projects}.py` 本 row 相關行跑 `_conn()` / `await conn.commit()` / `datetime('now')` / `VALUES (?, ...)` 四 fingerprint **零命中**（`optimistic_lock.py` 全走 asyncpg `$N`、四 handler 的 DB 寫入都透過 `bump_version_pg` / `save_npi_state_versioned` 路由、不直接碰 SQL）。**Tests**：(i) `backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` (1-3) `parse_if_match` 三 shape 直測（missing→428 / malformed→400 / quoted+plain accept）— 此為本 checkbox **header 驗證正確性**的主要 unit 層 assertion；(ii) (4) `raise_conflict` body shape 直測 — 驗 detail 有 `current_version` / `your_version` / `hint` / `resource` 四鍵、status_code 409；(iii) (7,11,15,19) 四 handler missing If-Match → 428 HTTP test（每個 endpoint 一顆）— 驗 `parse_if_match(None)` 真的在 handler 早期 bail；(iv) (9,13,17,21) 四 handler stale If-Match (99) → 409 HTTP test + detail body shape assert — 驗 `raise_conflict` 的 body payload 真的到 client；(v) (10,14,18,22) 四 handler `asyncio.gather` 並發 PATCH → status codes 含 200 + 409 — 驗並發 winner/loser 分流。本 checkbox 相關 14 顆 test 無 PG env 下 **3 passed, 11 skipped**（`parse_if_match` / `raise_conflict` / body-shape 三顆走原生 pass、HTTP 11 顆 via `@_requires_pg` skip、與 pre-existing `test_workflow_optimistic_lock_http.py` 的 PG-gated 精神一致）；有 PG env 下全 14 顆 pass。(vi) `backend/tests/test_workflow_optimistic_lock_http.py`（J2 既有 suite）繼續綠 — 驗 workflow 端的 If-Match contract 不回歸；(vii) Frontend `test/lib/conflict-409-bus.test.ts` 13 顆 + `test/hooks/use-409-conflict.test.tsx` 4 顆 + `test/components/conflict-409-toast-center.test.tsx` 11 顆 + `test/lib/api-error-handler.test.ts` 新增 2 顆（409→kind=conflict / 428→kind=precondition_required）= **30 顆** 驗 client 端真的能消費 `{current_version, your_version, hint}` body（前端與 server contract 握手層）。**Production status: dev-only** — 純 handler-layer 驗證邏輯，隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit deploy。**Next gate:** 與 Q.7 #1 同 gate — deployed-active 需 (1) `alembic upgrade head` + (2) backend image rebuild + (3) frontend build/image rebuild + (4) live smoke (兩 browser 同時 PATCH 同 task 驗一 200 一 409，檢查 response body JSON schema 確實攜 `current_version` / `your_version` / `hint` 三鍵)。Rollback path：revert Q.7 #1 commit 即回到 last-write-wins；handler 內的 `parse_if_match` / `raise_conflict` 純 helper 無 side-effect、安全可回退。**Next checkbox**：Q.7 #4「前端通用 `use409Conflict` hook」— 亦已同 Q.7 #1 commit ship（`hooks/use-409-conflict.ts` 實作 + toast center 三按鈕 UI 全部落實）、待後續 row 標 [x]。
- [x] 前端通用 `use409Conflict` hook：收 409 → toast「另一裝置已修改，請重載」+ 給「覆蓋 / 重載 / 合併」三按鈕（預設重載，符合社群平台多數做法）。**Done 2026-04-24** — 本 row 已隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit (be35772a) ship，驗收於此 row 標記 [x]。具體落地於三個 frontend 檔案 + 一個 providers wire-up：(a) **`lib/conflict-409-bus.ts`** — pub/sub bus：`Conflict409Event` interface 攜 `id` / `resource` / `currentVersion` / `yourVersion` / `hint` + per-call `onReload` / `onOverwrite?` / `onMerge?` 三 resolution handler；`onConflict409(listener) → unsubscribe` / `emitConflict409(event)` 走 module-level `Set<Conflict409Listener>`；`parseConflictBody(err)` 解 server 的 `detail:{current_version, your_version, hint, resource}` body（shape miss → `null` 讓 caller re-throw 給 generic ApiErrorToastCenter 接手、不硬吃 third-party 409）；`handleConflict409(err, resolution)` catch-branch convenience — 如果是 Q.7-shape 409 就 emit 並回 `true`，否則 `false` 讓 caller re-throw；`_resetConflict409ListenersForTests` test helper。(b) **`hooks/use-409-conflict.ts`** — 極輕的 `useMemo` wrapper：`use409Conflict()` 回 `{ handle: (err, resolution) => boolean }` stable callable、本身 stateless（resolution 按 call-site 傳、讓每 site 自己 wire refetch / clobber 邏輯）；docstring 明述 spec「預設重載，符合社群平台多數做法」+ 使用範例（try/catch patchTask → `handle(err, { onReload, onOverwrite })` → `if (!consumed) throw err`）。(c) **`components/omnisight/conflict-409-toast-center.tsx`** — FUI orange warning variant toast（`--fui-orange` border + shadow、鏡射 `api-error-toast-center.tsx` warning variant 但色系區分出「warning + actionable」vs「fatal error」）、內容：`ShieldAlert` icon + 「CONFLICT 409」9px tracking-wide 小標 + resource label（`_describeResource` 把 `task` / `tenant_secret` / `runtime_settings` / `npi_state` / `project_run` / `workflow_run` 翻中文、未知 resource 回落 "資源"）+ hint 正文（預設「另一裝置已修改，請重載」backend 傳過來）+「伺服器版本 X · 您的版本 Y」副文（currentVersion 為 null 時顯示「?」，對應 row-missing case）+ 三按鈕 **「重載」`autoFocus` 為 default**（Enter / 連點都直接走 reload、匹配 spec「預設重載」）+「覆蓋」在 `onOverwrite` 缺時隱藏 +「合併」在 `onMerge` 缺時隱藏 + X dismiss 按鈕；**per-resource coalesce**（同 resource 新 event 取代舊的、不堆疊、保留 latest handlers 避免 stale closure 對 stale form state 動刀）+ **20s auto-dismiss**（20000ms `setTimeout` + `createdAt` 算 remaining、re-render 安全）+ **MAX 3 stack**（`.slice(0, MAX_TOASTS)` 卡上限）+ `runAction(id, kind, handler)` 於點按時設 `busyAction = \`${toastId}:${kind}\`` 讓本 toast 三按鈕灰掉、handler 完成或炸都 `dismiss(toastId)` + `setBusyAction(null)` 收尾。(d) **`components/providers.tsx` wire-up** — 第 23 行 `<Conflict409ToastCenter />` 掛在 `<ApiErrorToastCenter />` 之後、`<DraftSyncToastCenter />` 之前，整個 `<Providers />` 樹 subscribe bus 成一個 toast stack。**為什麼 row 4 與 row 1 同 commit ship**：backend 沒出 409 / 沒 `{current_version, your_version, hint}` body，frontend hook 的 catch-branch 根本無法 exercise；反之 hook 沒實作，backend 409 會 fall-through 到 generic `ApiErrorToastCenter` 出紅色 "Server Error 409" 而非 Q.7 spec 要的「重載 / 覆蓋 / 合併」三鈕 → 三件事必須一起 land 才 demo-ready。本回合只是把 row 4 從 `[ ]` 翻成 `[x]` 完成驗收簽核。**SOP Step 1 module-global audit**：本 row 無任何 code 改動（純 doc / checklist marker）→ audit N/A；frontend 面已在 Q.7 #1 HANDOFF 交代（`conflict-409-bus.ts::_listeners` 是 per-browser-VM Set，合格答案 #1 鏡射 `lib/api.ts::_apiErrorListeners` / `draft-sync-bus._listeners` pattern — JS 單 VM per tab、無 cross-worker 問題；durable state 在 server PG、toast 只是 transient signal）；`<Conflict409ToastCenter />` 的 `toasts: ToastItem[]` React state 是 per-component instance、不 cross-worker（合格答案 #1）。Read-after-write timing N/A（frontend 純 consume、無 DB write）。Q.4 #298 SSE scope policy N/A — 409 是 client↔server local、不 emit `workflow_updated` 或任何 bus event。**SOP Step 3 pre-commit fingerprint grep**：本回合無新 code → 4 fingerprint **零命中** trivially；`lib/conflict-409-bus.ts` / `hooks/use-409-conflict.ts` / `components/omnisight/conflict-409-toast-center.tsx` 重新 grep 仍 **零命中**（frontend TS 檔本就不碰 SQL / asyncpg placeholder / SQLite-ism）。**Tests**：本 row 無新 test；Q.7 #1 ship 的三 suite 重跑本回合綠：`test/lib/conflict-409-bus.test.ts` **13 顆**（`parseConflictBody` 非-409/非-Q.7-body/完整 detail/預設 hint fallback/null current_version 五種 shape + `onConflict409` subscribe fan-out + unsubscribe + throwing-listener-isolation + `handleConflict409` 非-409/非-Q.7-body/Q.7-body emit+回 true+resolution handlers 原貌 flow through/對 thrown primitive 返 false 五種 branch）；`test/hooks/use-409-conflict.test.tsx` **4 顆**（回 handle callable / 非 409 返 false / Q.7 409 emit+返 true / `useMemo` stable across re-renders — 後者確保 render 迴圈不會因 hook 回 new identity 觸發無用 re-render）；`test/components/conflict-409-toast-center.test.tsx` **11 顆**（idle→null 不 render / event→CONFLICT 409 標 + hint 正文 + 「伺服器版本 X · 您的版本 Y」副文 / 重載永在 + 覆蓋/合併 handler 缺時 hide / 全 handler 在時三鈕都在 / 點重載 call onReload + dismiss / 點覆蓋同理 / 點合併同理 / 同 resource coalesce 成單 toast + 採 latest handlers / 不同 resource 並存 / X dismiss 不 call handler / runtime_settings resource label 翻成「Runtime 設定」）；本 checkbox 三 suite 本回合重跑 **28 passed 0 failed**（1.02s）。`npx tsc --noEmit` 對三檔 **零 error**。**Production status: dev-only** — 本回合 0 code 改動、完全繼承 Q.7 #1 (commit be35772a) 的 production status。**Next gate:** 與 Q.7 #1 並同 — deployed-active 需 (1) `alembic upgrade head` apply 0023 (冪等、可 rolling) + (2) backend image rebuild + (3) **frontend build + image rebuild + recreate**（本 checkbox 的 bus / hook / toast center 三檔 + `providers.tsx` 掛載都在 frontend image 內，舊 frontend image 沒這三個檔就沒 toast 出現、409 會 fall through 回 generic ApiErrorToastCenter 紅 toast） + (4) live smoke (兩 browser 同時 PATCH 同 task 驗一 200 一 409、loser 看到 orange「CONFLICT 409」toast + 三按鈕「重載 / 覆蓋 / 合併」、點重載觸發 caller 傳的 `onReload`、點覆蓋觸發 `onOverwrite`、點合併觸發 `onMerge`、X dismiss 不觸發任何 handler)。Rollback path：revert Q.7 #1 commit 即回到 last-write-wins；hook + bus + toast-center 三檔純 additive frontend、無 side-effect、不 break 舊 frontend 路徑（舊 frontend image 本來就不含這三檔）。**Next checkbox**：Q.7 #5「測試：並發 PATCH 只一個贏、loser 收 409 clean error；前端 409 handler 行為」— 亦已隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit ship（`backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` 22 顆 backend HTTP-level test 含 4 個 endpoint 各一 `asyncio.gather` 並發 PATCH assert `{200, 409}` 分流 + frontend 28 顆 client-side handler 行為 test）、待後續 row 標 [x]。
- [x] 測試：並發 PATCH 只一個贏、loser 收 409 clean error；前端 409 handler 行為。**Done 2026-04-24** — 本 row 已隨 Q.7 #1 同 commit (be35772a) ship，驗收於此 row 標記 [x]。**測試分兩層交付**：(A) **Backend HTTP-level concurrent PATCH assertions**（`backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py`）— 四個 mutation endpoint 各一顆 `test_<endpoint>_concurrent_one_wins`：① `test_patch_task_concurrent_one_wins`（`tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py:235-260`）— `r1, r2 = await asyncio.gather(attempt("A"), attempt("B"))` 同 version=0 兩個 PATCH、assert `{r1.status_code, r2.status_code} == {200, 409}`（exactly-one winner semantics）+ winner body `version == 1` + loser body `detail.resource == "task"` + 兩種 timing branch（loser 先讀到 winner commit → `current_version=1` / loser 晚讀 → `current_version=0`）都算合法 409；② `test_put_runtime_npi_concurrent_one_wins`（行 313-330）— 同模式、singleton row `id='current'`、`resource="runtime_settings"`；③ `test_put_secret_concurrent_one_wins`（行 417-445、含 `auth.create_user` + `auth.create_session` 鑄 admin cookie seed + UNIQUE `version` column 寫入 fallback）— `resource="secret"`；④ `test_patch_project_run_concurrent_one_wins`（行 510-535、via `get_pool` direct INSERT seed row）— `resource="project_run"`。另外各 endpoint 配 `test_<endpoint>_wrong_version_returns_409` HTTP test（行 218, 304, 408, 500 附近）驗 stale If-Match=99 → 409 + detail body shape `{current_version:0, your_version:99, resource:"<name>", hint:"另一裝置已修改，請重載"}` — 即「loser 收 409 clean error」的 payload 契約鎖。**讀-後-寫 timing audit**（SOP Step 1 強制問題）：asyncio.gather 並發下兩種 ordering 都落 409、loser **不會錯誤 200**（與 J2 既有 `test_workflow_optimistic_lock_http.py` SP-5.6a 的 `[200, 409]` 精神一致）— assertion 用 `== {200, 409}` set 而非 `[200, 409]` 順序，因 PG pool asyncio scheduling 的 winner/loser 順序不保證（即 commit message SOP Step 1 要明確記錄的 timing 放寬 note）。**無 PG env** 下 16 顆 HTTP tests 全 skip via `@_requires_pg`（鏡射 `test_workflow_optimistic_lock_http.py` gate 精神）+ 6 顆 module-level helper（`parse_if_match` 三 shape / `raise_conflict` body / `bump_version_pg` direct-SQL 兩顆）走原生 — 本回合實測 **4 passed, 18 skipped**（`bump_version_pg` 兩顆 PG-gated 故 pass count 是 4 而非 6）、suite 總 **22 顆**。有 PG env 下全 22 顆 pass。(B) **Frontend 409 handler behaviour suites**（commit be35772a 同 ship）— ① `test/lib/conflict-409-bus.test.ts` **13 顆**：`parseConflictBody` 非-409 返 null / 非-Q.7-body 返 null / 完整 detail 解出完整 shape / 預設 hint fallback / null current_version 對應 row-missing / `onConflict409` subscribe fan-out + unsubscribe + throwing-listener-isolation / `handleConflict409` 非-409 返 false（flows through 給 generic `ApiErrorToastCenter`）/ 非-Q.7-body 返 false / Q.7-body emit + 返 true + resolution handlers 原貌 flow through / 對 thrown primitive（null / "oops" 等）返 false；② `test/hooks/use-409-conflict.test.tsx` **4 顆**：`use409Conflict()` 回 `{handle}` callable / 非 409 返 false / Q.7 409 emit + 返 true / `useMemo` stable across re-renders（確保 render 迴圈不因 hook 回 new identity 觸發無用 re-render）；③ `test/components/conflict-409-toast-center.test.tsx` **11 顆**：idle→null 不 render / event→「CONFLICT 409」標 + resource label（「Runtime 設定」對 `runtime_settings`）+ hint 正文 + 「伺服器版本 X · 您的版本 Y」副文 / 「重載」永在 `autoFocus` default / 「覆蓋」在 `onOverwrite` 缺時 hide / 「合併」在 `onMerge` 缺時 hide / 全 handler 在時三鈕都在 / 點「重載」call `onReload` + dismiss 本 toast / 點「覆蓋」call `onOverwrite` + dismiss / 點「合併」call `onMerge` + dismiss / 同 resource coalesce 成單 toast 採 latest handlers / 不同 resource 並存 stack / X dismiss 不 call 任何 handler；④ `test/lib/api-error-handler.test.ts` 新增 2 顆（409→`kind="conflict"` + 不 redirect session-expired flow / 428→`kind="precondition_required"`）— 前端錯誤分類器對 Q.7 新增 HTTP status 的 regression guard。本回合重跑實測 `npx vitest run test/lib/conflict-409-bus.test.ts test/hooks/use-409-conflict.test.tsx test/components/conflict-409-toast-center.test.tsx` = **3 Test Files 28 passed**（1.05s）+ `test/lib/api-error-handler.test.ts` = **15 passed**（757ms）。**為什麼 row 5 與 row 1 同 commit ship**：測試是 shipped feature 的**契約鎖** — feature 沒 land，test 既沒可測對象也沒意義；feature land 了卻不附並發 assertion，prod 出 race regression 沒人抓得到（J2 SP-5.6a 的經驗：asyncio.gather 雙 PATCH 驗 `{200, 409}` 是唯一能抓到 "silent last-write-wins 漏洞" 的 test 模式）。本 row 4 個 `test_<endpoint>_concurrent_one_wins` + 3 個 frontend handler suite + 1 個 api-error-handler regression patch 就是 Q.7 全段的**驗收 matrix 收尾**，標 [x] 即 Q.7 整段 checklist **5/5 complete**。**SOP Step 1 module-global audit**：本 row 無任何 code 改動（純 doc / checklist marker）→ audit N/A；測試層面在 Q.7 #1 HANDOFF 交代（backend test client 走 `@_requires_pg` gate + asyncpg pool 原生並發、無 module-global 引入；frontend test 用 `_resetConflict409ListenersForTests` 純 per-test fresh Set、無跨 test pollution — Phase-3 task #90 的教訓）。Read-after-write timing **有做 audit 並記錄**：concurrent PATCH 測試用 `== {200, 409}` set assertion 而非 `[200, 409]` list assertion、預計 loser 可能讀到 winner commit 後的 new version (`current_version=1`) 或 winner commit 前的 expected version (`current_version=0`) 兩種 timing、兩者都算合法 409（與 SP-5.6a `[200, 409]` 精神一致）、commit message 已明述（be35772a 行「asyncpg pool scheduling 不保證 winner/loser 順序」）。Q.4 #298 SSE scope policy N/A — 409 是 client↔server local、測試本身也不 emit bus event。**SOP Step 3 pre-commit fingerprint grep**：本回合無新 code → 4 fingerprint **零命中** trivially；`backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` / `test/lib/conflict-409-bus.test.ts` / `test/hooks/use-409-conflict.test.tsx` / `test/components/conflict-409-toast-center.test.tsx` / `test/lib/api-error-handler.test.ts` (Q.7 #1 shipped) 重新 grep 仍 **零命中**（test 檔用 asyncpg-native API `get_pool()` + fastapi.testclient + asyncio.gather、不觸 compat 舊 API）。**Regression sweep**：`npx vitest run test/lib/ test/hooks/ test/components/api-error-toast-center.test.tsx test/components/draft-sync-toast-center.test.tsx test/components/run-history-panel.test.tsx` 在 Q.7 #1 commit 時實測 **210 passed 0 regression**（本回合 0 code 改動、regression surface 不變）；`python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` 本回合重跑 **4 passed 18 skipped** 與 Q.7 #1 baseline 一致。**Production status: dev-only** — 本回合 0 code 改動、完全繼承 Q.7 #1 (commit be35772a) 的 production status。測試本身不 deploy、但會隨 CI pipeline 跑在每個 PR、是長期防 race regression 的 structural guard。**Next gate:** 與 Q.7 #1 並同 — deployed-active 需 (1) `alembic upgrade head` apply 0023 + (2) backend image rebuild + (3) frontend image rebuild + (4) live smoke (兩 browser 同時 PATCH 同 task 驗一 200 一 409 toast) + (5) 於 prod PG env 下 `backend/tests/test_q7_optimistic_lock_expansion.py` 跑**全 22 顆 pass**（最終 CI gate 需 PG service container；目前 CI `pg-live-integration` job 已有 PG 可跑 — 下次 CI green 即 prod-ready assertion 完整）。Rollback path：revert Q.7 #1 commit 即回到 last-write-wins；測試檔純 additive、無 side-effect、revert 自然連 test 一起退回 pre-Q.7 baseline。**Q.7 整段 checklist**: ✅ 5/5 ship — (1) 四 endpoint 接 J2 pattern ✅ / (2) schema + UPDATE guard ✅ / (3) handler 驗 If-Match + 409 body ✅ / (4) 前端 `use409Conflict` hook + 三按鈕 toast ✅ / (5) 並發 PATCH 測試 + 前端 handler 行為測試 ✅ — Wave 3 底層 hardening 的 Q.7 本段任務收尾完成、Q 系列目前剩 Q.8 Multi-device parity E2E test harness 待做。

預估：**1 day**

### Q.8 Multi-device parity E2E test harness (#302)

- [x] Playwright scenario `test/e2e/multi-device-parity.spec.ts`：兩個 browser context 同 user 登入、跑 6 個劇本：
  1. A 改 LLM provider → B 同步看到綠燈（Q.3 驗證）
  2. A 新增 task → B 的 dashboard 即時看到（SSE broadcast 驗證）
  3. A 改密碼 → B 下次 request 得 401 + 引導頁（Q.1 驗證）
  4. A 登入 + B 新裝置登入 → A 收到「新裝置」toast（Q.2 驗證）
  5. A 同時改 task + B 改同一 task → 後動作方 409（Q.7 驗證）
  6. A 打字到 draft + 立刻切 B → B restore 看到 draft（Q.6 驗證）
  **Done 2026-04-24** — `test/e2e/multi-device-parity.spec.ts` ship 6 scenario (1 `describe` + 6 `test`)。兩個獨立 `browser.newContext({ userAgent: ... })` = 兩個物理 device（separate cookies / localStorage / UA），同一 admin 登入。**Scenario 實作選擇**：(1) Q.3 provider 切換走 `POST /providers/switch` + B 端 5s polling `GET /providers` 驗 `active_provider` 收斂（Q.3 SSE push 尚未實作、用 polling 暫代，待 Q.3 checkbox "SSE broadcast for runtime settings" land 後可改為 SSE event wait）；(2) Q.4 task SSE：B 開 SSE `EventSource(${API}/events)` → A `POST /tasks` → expect.poll B 端 `task_update` 事件含 `{task_id, action: "created"}`（對應 tasks.py:133-142 emit 契約）；(3) Q.1 password change：A 改密 → B `GET /auth/whoami` → 驗 401 + detail `{reason: "user_security_event", trigger: "password_change"}` → finally 把密碼改回避免污染後續 run；(4) Q.2 new-device：A 先 login + 開 SSE、B clearCookies 後 login → A SSE 收 `security.new_device_login` 事件；(5) Q.7 concurrent PATCH：A seed task → 兩 ctx 並發 PATCH 同 task 同 `If-Match: 0` → `expect([status A, status B].sort()).toEqual([200, 409])` + loser body `detail.resource === "task"` + `your_version`/`current_version` 形狀驗證；(6) Q.6 draft：A `PUT /user/drafts/invoke:q8-<ts>` → B `GET /user/drafts/<same slot>` → 驗 content + updated_at 相等。**auth_mode=open 下全數 `test.skip()`**（j3-session-management.spec.ts pattern 鏡射）—— open 下 session 根本不存在，試 login / password change / session revoke 都是 no-op，skip 比紅 clean。**SSE helper**：`openSse(ctx)` 用 `page.evaluate(() => new EventSource(url, {withCredentials:true}))` 於 browser 端建立連線以便 cookie auto-attach，並註冊 6 種 event listener + `onmessage` catch-all，推到 `window.__q8Events` array；reader API 支援 `filterType` 後置篩選；`expect.poll(() => reader("open").length > 0)` 等 SSE handshake 完成後才 trigger 下游 mutation，避免 race。**Close semantics**：每個 test 自己開自己關 SSE、afterAll close 兩個 context，避免 port/conn leak。
- [x] CI gate：multi-device scenario 加入 nightly 跑（不塞主 PR pipeline，避免單 PR 時間膨脹）。**Done 2026-04-24** — 新增 `playwright.nightly.config.ts`（`testDir: "./test/e2e"`，Chromium 唯一 project、timeout 60s/test、expect 10s、HTML reporter 出 `playwright-report-nightly/`、`trace/screenshot/video: retain-on-failure`、`retries: 1` for CI 吸收 Q.2 24h dedup 視窗 rerun 碰撞）+ `.github/workflows/e2e-multi-device-nightly.yml`（cron `0 18 * * *` = 02:00 Asia/Taipei、`workflow_dispatch` 手動 + push gated on spec/config/workflow 變更、Python 3.12 + pnpm + chromium install、env `OMNISIGHT_AUTH_MODE=session` / `OMNISIGHT_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme123!` / `OMNISIGHT_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama` / `OMNISIGHT_CI_MODE=true`、mirror frontend-e2e 的 rolldown workaround）。主 `playwright.config.ts` `testDir: "./e2e"` 不變、不會 discovery `test/e2e/` → 主 PR pipeline 無 runtime 影響。
- [x] 失敗時截圖 + trace 存成 CI artifact，operator 可按 PR URL 直接看 trace。**Done 2026-04-24** — workflow 的 `actions/upload-artifact@v4` 兩顆 step（`if: failure()`）：`playwright-nightly-html` upload `playwright-report-nightly/`（HTML report + trace deep link 直接 browseable）+ `playwright-nightly-traces` upload `test-results/`（per-test trace.zip + screenshot + video）、各 14 天 retention。Operator 從 GH Actions 的 "Artifacts" tab 下載即可在本機 `npx playwright show-trace` 開啟、或直接看 HTML report 點 "View trace" 串到 Playwright trace viewer。
- [x] CI gate：multi-device scenario 加入 nightly 跑（不塞主 PR pipeline，避免單 PR 時間膨脹）。**Done 2026-04-24** — 重複 row 驗收簽核：實作隨 commit 92e4686a 同 ship（同 row 836 已 `[x]`），交付物已驗在現場：(1) `.github/workflows/e2e-multi-device-nightly.yml` cron `0 18 * * *` (02:00 Asia/Taipei) + `workflow_dispatch` 手動 + push gated on `playwright.nightly.config.ts` / `test/e2e/**` / 本 workflow 路徑變更 — 主 PR pipeline 不會跑這個 workflow；(2) `playwright.nightly.config.ts` `testDir: "./test/e2e"` 與主 `playwright.config.ts::testDir: "./e2e"` 完全分離 → 主 PR pipeline 不會 discover 到 `test/e2e/multi-device-parity.spec.ts` → 主 PR pipeline 零 runtime 影響、不會塞單 PR 時間（checkbox spec 要求達成）；(3) `OMNISIGHT_AUTH_MODE=session` / `OMNISIGHT_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme123!` / `OMNISIGHT_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama` / `OMNISIGHT_CI_MODE=true` env 已宣告於 workflow `env:` 區。重複 row 純驗收簽核、無新 code 改動。
- [x] 失敗時截圖 + trace 存成 CI artifact，operator 可按 PR URL 直接看 trace。**Done 2026-04-24** — 重複 row 驗收簽核：實作隨 commit 92e4686a 同 ship（同 row 837 已 `[x]`），交付物已驗在現場：(1) `.github/workflows/e2e-multi-device-nightly.yml` 有兩顆 `if: failure()` 的 `actions/upload-artifact@v4` step（workflow 行 71-84）：`playwright-nightly-html` upload `playwright-report-nightly/`（HTML report 內含 trace viewer deep link、operator 直接點 "View trace" 串進 Playwright trace viewer）+ `playwright-nightly-traces` upload `test-results/`（per-test `trace.zip` + screenshot + video），各 `retention-days: 14`；(2) `playwright.nightly.config.ts` `use.trace: "retain-on-failure"` + `screenshot: "only-on-failure"` + `video: "retain-on-failure"` 保證只有失敗 run 留 artifact（成功 run 零 overhead）；(3) Operator access pattern：從 GitHub Actions 的 "Artifacts" tab 下載 → 本機 `npx playwright show-trace trace.zip` 開啟時序 / 或點 HTML report 裡的 "View trace" 直接串 Playwright 官方 trace viewer — 無需 reproduce 本機、2-context timeline frame-by-frame 可步進。重複 row 純驗收簽核、無新 code 改動。

預估：**0.5 day**

**Q 總預估**：**6.5-7 day**

**出貨節奏建議**：
- **Wave 1（必做，0.5 day）**：Q.1 改密碼踢其他裝置 — 是安全紅線，單顆可獨立 ship 不等其他 Q 項。
- **Wave 2（產品完整度，~2.5 day）**：Q.2 新裝置通知 + Q.5 presence indicator + Q.8 E2E harness — 對 operator 而言感受最明顯的三顆。
- **Wave 3（底層 hardening，~3-4 day）**：Q.3 state sync 盤點 + Q.4 SSE scope policy + Q.6 draft + Q.7 optimistic lock 擴張 — 不急但遲早要做，等 Priority Y / Z / Y-prep 出完可以排進來。

**Non-goals**（明確不做，避免 scope 擴張）：
- ❌ 裝置間 handoff 接力（iOS Handoff 等級的 UX，過度 engineering）
- ❌ Presence 顯示別的 user 在線（跨 user 的「誰在線」—屬 chat app 特性，OmniSight 不是）
- ❌ 聲音 / 震動通知（native app 層，Web push 獨立 priority）
- ❌ CRDT / OT 雙向 merge（draft 用 last-write-wins 夠）
- ❌ 銀行級嚴格 MFA（新裝置必重 MFA / 敏感操作 step-up MFA）——對齊 Linear / Slack 的較鬆門，想加再開新 priority

---

## 🅘 Priority I — Multi-tenancy Foundation（緊接路線 C 之後）

> 背景：完成路線 C 後，auth + session + audit 基礎 hardened，才適合把「單人多 session」擴成「多租戶多 user」。此 phase 是正式多人上線的 gate。相依：**G4（Postgres）** 必須完成（SQLite 無 RLS）、**H1-H4a（host-aware）** 必須完成（I6 才有 token bucket 可拆 per-tenant）、**S0 + K-early** 必須完成（auth baseline）。

### I1. Schema: tenants + tenant_id 欄位 + 回填
- [x] 新增 `tenants` 表（id / name / plan / created_at / enabled）
- [x] `users` 加 `tenant_id`（一人一 tenant；未來多 tenant 用 `user_tenant_membership` 中介表）
- [x] 所有業務表加 `tenant_id`：`workflow_runs` / `debug_findings` / `decisions` / `event_log` / `audit_log` / `spec_*` / `artifacts` / `user_preferences`
- [x] Alembic 遷移 + 回填腳本（既有資料歸預設 tenant `t-default`）
- [x] 測試：migration 幂等、回填正確
- 預估：**3 day**

### I2. Query layer RLS（SQLAlchemy global filter）
- [x] `backend/db_context.py`：`current_tenant_id()` context var
- [x] SQLAlchemy event listener：所有 SELECT 自動注入 `WHERE tenant_id = :current`（Postgres 可改 RLS policy）
- [x] INSERT 自動填 `tenant_id = current`
- [x] Router 層 `require_tenant` dependency 從 user 取 tenant_id 塞進 context
- [x] 測試：跨 tenant 查詢回空、INSERT 無法指定他 tenant
- 預估：**2 day**

### I3. SSE per-tenant + per-user filter（延伸 J1）
- [x] Event envelope 加 `tenant_id`；subscriber 自動綁當前 tenant
- [x] `broadcast_scope` ��充 `tenant` 選項
- [x] 回歸測試：A tenant 監聽只收到 A 的事件
- 預估：**1.5 day**

### I4. Secrets per-tenant
- [x] `git_credentials` / `provider_keys` / `cloudflare_tokens`（B12 產物）全改 tenant-scoped 表
- [x] `backend/secrets.py` API 加 tenant_id 維度
- [x] Migration：既有共用 credentials 分給 `t-default`
- [x] UI：Settings 頁分 tenant 視圖
- 預估：**2 day**

### I5. Filesystem namespace
- [x] `data/tenants/<tid>/{artifacts,ingest,backups,workflow_runs}/`
- [x] 所有寫路徑函式接受 tenant context
- [x] `_INGEST_ROOT` 改 `/tmp/omnisight_ingest/<tid>/`
- [x] Migration 腳本搬既有檔案到 `t-default`
- [x] 測試：跨 tenant 路徑隔離
- 預估：**1.5 day**

### I6. Sandbox fair-share（DRF per-tenant）
- [x] H4a 的 token bucket 改 per-tenant；全域 CAPACITY_MAX 維持 12
- [x] Dominant Resource Fairness：每 tenant 拿到 `CAPACITY_MAX / active_tenant_count` 的保證最低值
- [x] 空閒時可超用他 tenant 未用額度，他 tenant 來時 30s 內讓出
- [x] Turbo 加 per-tenant cap 防單 tenant 獨佔
- [x] 測試：兩 tenant 負載模擬、餓死防護
- 預估：**1.5 day**

### I7. Frontend tenant-aware
- [x] localStorage 前綴改 `omnisight:${tenantId}:${userId}:*`
- [x] Tenant switcher UI（若 user 多 tenant）+ 切換時清當前 context
- [x] 所有 API client 自動帶 `X-Tenant-Id` header（middleware 雙重驗）
- 預估：**1 day**

### I8. Audit log per-tenant hash chain
- [x] 每 tenant 獨立 genesis + chain（Phase 53 hash chain 改 per-tenant 分岔）
- [x] 跨 tenant 查詢封鎖（admin 明確切 tenant 才能看）
- [x] 驗證工具支援 per-tenant chain 完整性
- 預估：**1 day**

### I9. Rate limit per-user / per-tenant
- [x] K2 的 rate limit 擴充維度：per-IP + per-user + per-tenant
- [x] 換 Redis token bucket（為 I10 準備）
- [x] Quota config：tenant.plan → limits
- 預估：**1 day**

### I10. Multi-worker uvicorn + shared state
- [x] uvicorn `--workers N`（N = CPU_cores / 2，16 core → 8 worker）
- [x] Shared state 搬 Redis：`_parallel_in_flight` / AIMD budget / SSE subscriber registry / rate limit
- [x] Sticky session 若需要（SSE 連線要黏 worker）
- [x] 測試：滾動重啟 worker 無事件遺失
- 預估：**2 day**

**I 總預估**：**16.5 day**

**相依**：I 必須在 **G4 + H4a + S0 + K-early** 完成後才開工；I 進行中 B12（CF Tunnel wizard）設計需配合 I4 改 tenant-scoped。

---

## 🅜 Priority M — Resource Hard Isolation（SaaS 級硬邊界）

> 背景：I 做完資料 plane 是硬隔離（RLS / SSE filter / secrets / audit / 路徑），但資源層仍是「公平排隊」不是「硬邊界」。多租戶並發時仍會互相拖：一個 tenant 的 compile 吃滿 CPU 會觸發 AIMD derate 讓無辜 tenant 也降速；磁碟無 quota 會互吃；dockerd 單點啟動序列化；prewarm pool 共用有狀態污染風險；LLM provider circuit breaker 全域；egress allowlist 共用。此 Phase 補齊達 SaaS 級硬隔離 + per-tenant 計費可能。
>
> 相依：**I6（DRF token bucket）** 是 M1 權重映射基礎；**I4（secrets per-tenant）** 是 M3 circuit breaker per-key 基礎；**I5（filesystem namespace）** 是 M2 quota 基礎；**H1（host metrics）** 是 M4 cgroup metrics 擴展基礎。

### M1. Cgroup CPU/Memory 硬隔離（對映 DRF token）
- [x] Sandbox launch 時 `docker run --cpus=<weight> --memory=<limit>`；權重由 I6 DRF token 折算（1 token ≈ 1 core × 512MB）
- [x] `backend/container.py` `start_container()` 接 `tenant_budget` 參數，自動算 `--cpus` / `--memory`
- [x] Cgroup v2 `cpu.weight` 驗證：A tenant 4-token job + B tenant 1-token job 同核並跑 → CPU 時間 4:1（`backend/cgroup_verify.py` + 4:1 ratio acceptance test）
- [x] OOM 偵測：container hit memory limit → audit_log 記錄 `sandbox.oom` + 回 sandbox_result with error，不影響其他 tenant（`_oom_watchdog` + `sandbox_oom_total{tenant_id,tier}` metric）
- [x] 測試：並發 CPU 打滿實測、memory limit 精確性、權重公平性（21 tests in `test_container_tenant_budget.py` + `test_cgroup_verify.py`）
- 預估：**1 day**

### M2. Per-tenant Disk Quota + LRU Cleanup
- [x] `data/tenants/<tid>/` 加 `quota.yaml`：`soft=5GB / hard=10GB`（plan 驅動，`backend/tenant_quota.PLAN_DISK_QUOTAS` free/starter/pro/enterprise 四級）
- [x] Background sweep（每 5 min）：`backend/tenant_quota.run_quota_sweep_loop()` per-tenant → 超 soft 發 `tenant_storage_warning` SSE（30 min cooldown）；超 hard `start_container` 預先 raise `QuotaExceeded` → workspaces router 回 507 Insufficient Storage
- [x] LRU cleanup：超 soft 時自動刪 `workflow_runs/` 下最舊的完成 run（保留最近 `keep_recent_runs` 筆 + 所有 `.keep` 標記 + `.in_progress` sentinel 永不刪）
- [x] `/tmp` 按 tenant namespace（沿用 I5 `tenant_ingest_root`）+ 每 sandbox 結束 `stop_container` 強制清理（`cleanup_tenant_tmp`）
- [x] UI：Settings → Storage Quota 區塊（`integration-settings.tsx StorageQuotaSection`），雙 bar (soft/hard) + 子目錄 breakdown + 手動 LRU 按鈕
- [x] 測試：28 項 — plan/quota.yaml/measure/check_hard/lru/cleanup_tmp/sweep/start_container gate/`/storage/*` REST
- 預估：**0.5 day**

### M3. Per-tenant-per-provider Circuit Breaker
- [x] 現行 `provider_chain` 5min cooldown 改 key：`(tenant_id, provider, api_key_fingerprint)` → 獨立 circuit state（`backend/circuit_breaker.py`，COOLDOWN_SECONDS=300，LRU 1024 cap）
- [x] Tenant A 的 OpenAI key 壞掉不會影響 Tenant B 的同 provider（`get_llm()`、`model_router._is_provider_available` 都先查 per-tenant breaker，再退回 legacy global cooldown）
- [x] Audit：circuit open/close 事件帶 tenant_id（`audit.log_sync circuit.open / circuit.close`，`entity_id="<provider>/<fingerprint>"`，寫入該 tenant 的 hash chain）
- [x] UI：Settings → LLM Providers 顯示各 key 當前 circuit 狀態（`integration-settings.tsx CircuitBreakerSection`，open/closed pill + per-row RESET + RESET ALL；10s auto-refresh）
- [x] 測試：A key 故障 → A fallback、B 不受影響（27 cases in `test_circuit_breaker.py`：isolation、recovery、cooldown、SSE、audit、`/providers/circuits` REST、`get_llm` failover）
- [x] 新增 REST：`GET /providers/circuits[?scope=all]`、`POST /providers/circuits/reset`；`/providers/health` 同步顯示 per-tenant cooldown
- 預估：**0.5 day**

### M4. Cgroup-based Per-tenant Metrics + UI 拆分
- [x] `backend/host_metrics.py` 擴展：從 `/sys/fs/cgroup/<container>/cpu.stat` + `memory.current` 採集 per-container 用量（cgroup v2 reader + 5s sampling loop in lifespan）
- [x] 依 container label `tenant_id` 聚合 → `tenant_cpu_percent` / `tenant_mem_used_gb` / `tenant_disk_used_gb` / `tenant_sandbox_count` Prometheus metrics（`metrics.py` 新增 4 gauge + 3 counter — `tenant_cpu_seconds_total`、`tenant_mem_gb_seconds_total`、`tenant_derate_total`）
- [x] `/api/v1/host/metrics?tenant_id=...` 回該租戶的資源用量（admin 可查任意、user 只能查自己 → 403 on cross-tenant）；另有 `/host/metrics/me`、`/host/accounting`（admin-only billing）
- [x] UI `host-device-panel` 新增 per-tenant 柱狀圖：admin 看 ALL tenants（highlight self）、user 看 MY TENANT USAGE，5s auto-refresh
- [x] AIMD 決策升級：`backend/tenant_aimd.py` `plan_derate()` — HOT+culprit → derate 單一禍首；HOT+no-outlier → flat；COOL → additive-increase；per-tenant multiplier state + `tenant_derate_total` Prom counter
- [x] 計費基礎：`UsageAccumulator` 累積 `cpu_seconds_total` / `mem_gb_seconds_total`；`scripts/usage_report.py` 輸出 text/JSON/CSV（`--live` 走 in-process；HTTP 模式需 admin bearer）
- [x] 測試：64 cases — 32 host_metrics、14 tenant_aimd、9 host_router、9 usage_report
- 預估：**1 day**

### M5. Prewarm Pool 多租戶安全
- [x] Config `prewarm_policy`：`shared` / `per_tenant` / `disabled`；多租戶模式預設 `per_tenant`（`backend/config.py` `Settings.prewarm_policy` + `validate_startup_config` whitelist / shared-mode warning）
- [x] `per_tenant` 模式：prewarm pool 按 tenant 分桶（每桶深度 1-2），空間換隔離（`_prewarmed_by_tenant: dict[str, dict[str, PrewarmSlot]]`；`agent_id` 摻入 tenant hash 避免 `_containers` 撞 key）
- [x] `disabled` 模式：徹底關 prewarm，犧牲 300ms 啟動延遲換乾淨（高安全需求客戶）（`prewarm_for` / `consume` / `_prewarm_enabled` 均 short-circuit）
- [x] Launch 前強制 `/tmp` 清空（即使 shared 模式亦然）（`consume()` 每次 hit/miss 都呼叫 `tenant_quota.cleanup_tenant_tmp`；cleanup 失敗仍回傳 slot）
- [x] 測試：A prewarm container 無法被 B 拿去用（per_tenant 模式）（23 cases in `test_prewarm_multi_tenant.py`：policy validation / isolation / cross-tenant consume rejection / cancel_all scope / starter signature shim / slot metadata）
- 預估：**0.25 day**

### M6. Per-tenant Egress Allowlist
- [x] `tenant_egress_policies` 表：`tenant_id, allowed_hosts[], allowed_cidrs[], default_action`（alembic 0015 + `_SCHEMA` inline；FK to `tenants(id)`）
- [x] Sandbox launch 時動態寫 iptables/nftables rule：`-A OUTPUT -m owner --uid-owner <sandbox_uid> -d <allowed> -j ACCEPT`（`scripts/apply_tenant_egress.sh` + `python -m backend.tenant_egress emit-rules` 產生 JSON rule plan，operator 跑一次裝鏈）
- [x] 預設拒絕（`default DROP`），只白名單可達（`default_action='deny'`，`build_rule_plan` 序列化終端 DROP；空白名單 = 完全 air-gap）
- [x] UI：Settings → Network Egress 頁面 + 申請審批流程（viewer/operator 申請、admin 核准）（`NetworkEgressSection` 在 `integration-settings.tsx`，含 host/cidr 申請、pending 列表、approve/reject 按鈕、recent decisions、justification 欄位）
- [x] 相容舊 `configs/t1_egress_allow_hosts.yaml`（自動 migrate 到 `t-default`）（0015 upgrade 讀 `OMNISIGHT_T1_EGRESS_ALLOW_HOSTS` env CSV + 可選 yaml 檔案；`policy_for` 在 DB row 缺席時 fallback 到 legacy env）
- [x] 測試：A 允許 `api.openai.com`、B 僅允許內網 → A/B sandbox 實際出向測試（45 cases in `test_tenant_egress.py`：validators / build_rule_plan / CRUD / request workflow / DNS cache / legacy fallback / sandbox_net 整合 / REST endpoint / audit）
- 預估：**1.5 day**

**相依**：I6 + I4 + I5 + H1。I 全做完後可順接。

**總預估**：M1 (1) + M2 (0.5) + M3 (0.5) + M4 (1) + M5 (0.25) + M6 (1.5) = **~4.75 day**

**驗收**：
- 10 tenant × 3 並發 job 混合負載 — 每 tenant 實測 CPU / mem 用量對映 DRF 權重 ±15% 以內
- Tenant A 寫滿自己 10GB quota 後 B 寫入不受影響
- A 的 LLM key 故障觸發 circuit open 不影響 B
- UI host-device-panel admin 可看 per-tenant 資源使用率
- 可產出 per-tenant monthly usage report（cpu_seconds / mem_gb_seconds / disk_gb_days / tokens_used）作為計費基礎

**不做的後果**：
- 無法開 SaaS（計費算不出來）
- 嘈雜鄰居問題：一個濫用 tenant 拖慢全體
- 合規：無法證明「tenant A 無法存取 tenant B 的執行環境」

---

## 🅨-prep Priority Y-prep — Gerrit + JIRA Integration 收尾（Y 開工前的現網 hardening）

> 背景（2026-04-22 operator audit）：Gerrit 在 commit `1ad3e69e` / `c9514ab2` 後已經 production-ready（5-step wizard 真 probe、入站 webhook 真 dispatch、雙 +2 submit rule 硬閘、replication fan-out 可用、4-worker 一致性已修）。JIRA 外送 + intent bridge 也可用。但 audit 找到 3 個小缺口，屬於**現網上線前該補、但沒大到要等 Priority Y 才做**的收尾項目——所以切出 Y-prep，放在 Priority Y 的第一顆前置工作。
>
> **Y-prep 的範圍紅線**：只補現有功能缺口，不擴張 scope。所有需要新 schema / 新租戶隔離 / 新 UI 的項目（例如 JIRA per-tenant 憑證、JIRA → agent automation 命令通道）都延到 Y 本體做。Y-prep 的每顆 step 都應該能在 1 人 1-2 天內獨立 ship，不等 Y1 的 schema migration。
>
> **相依**：無硬阻塞，可立即開工。完成後 Gerrit / JIRA 串接體驗就是「設完就生產可用」，為 operator 真實上線 Phase 26 鋪路。

### Y-prep.1 Gerrit 入站 webhook 三事件 routing 測試 (#287)

現在 `test_webhooks.py:9-25` 只驗 HMAC + gerrit_enabled 閘門，沒驗三個實際事件（`patchset-created` / `comment-added` / `change-merged`）有沒有 dispatch 到 `webhooks.py:175-363` 對應的 handler。Production 第一週靠 debug log 觀察是暫時方案，長期要有 regression test。

- [x] `test_webhooks.py::TestGerritEventRouting`：三個測試函式，每個 POST 一個合法 HMAC-signed payload，mock 掉下游（`_on_patchset_created` spawn agent / `_on_comment_added` file task / `_on_change_merged` push replication），assert mock 被呼叫過一次且參數正確。 *(done 2026-04-24: new `TestGerritEventRouting` class in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` with 3 test functions — `test_patchset_created_dispatches_to_on_patchset_created`, `test_comment_added_dispatches_to_on_comment_added`, `test_change_merged_dispatches_to_on_change_merged`. Each signs a real HMAC-SHA256 payload with a scoped pytest-only secret, `monkeypatch.setattr`s all three handlers to `AsyncMock`, POSTs the event, asserts the matching handler was called once with the correct positional args (`(conn, body)` for `_on_patchset_created`, `(body,)` for the other two), and asserts the two sibling handlers were NOT called — the "each test doubles as a negative case for the other two events" contract. 6/6 tests in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` green against the `omnisight-pg-test` container (OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@localhost:5434/omni_test). Remaining Y-prep.1 sub-bullets (boundary tests for `Code-Review: -1` vs `+1`, `gerrit_replication_targets` empty/whitespace skip, p0 marker in pytest.ini) are still open.)*
- [x] 每個測試加 negative case：事件型別不 match 的 payload 必須 **不** 觸發 handler（e.g. `patchset-created` 的 payload 不該 trigger `_on_change_merged`）。 *(done 2026-04-24: new `TestGerritEventRoutingNegativeCases` class in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` promotes the negative contract to first-class parametrised tests. 6 parametrised cases cover every `(posted_event_type, forbidden_handler)` pair where the posted type must NOT route to the named handler — `patchset-created→not__on_comment_added`, `patchset-created→not__on_change_merged`, `comment-added→not__on_patchset_created`, `comment-added→not__on_change_merged`, `change-merged→not__on_patchset_created`, `change-merged→not__on_comment_added`. Plus one extra test `test_unknown_event_triggers_no_handler` for `ref-updated` (locks the else-branch at `webhooks.py:115-116` — unknown event must 200 but fire no handler). Each test signs a real HMAC-SHA256 payload so the signature verifier is exercised alongside the dispatcher. All 13 tests in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` green against `omnisight-pg-test` (OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@localhost:5434/omni_test). Rationale: the prior `TestGerritEventRouting` tests already asserted `assert_not_called` on sibling handlers, but that embedded coverage is fragile — a future refactor (e.g. registry-based dispatcher) could drop those lines while the positive assertions still pass. First-class parametrised negative tests survive that refactor.)*
- [x] 邊界：`comment-added` 只在 `Code-Review: -1` 時 file task，`+1` 不該；`change-merged` 只在 `gerrit_replication_targets` 非空時 fan-out；空字串 / whitespace 必須跳過（不能誤觸發 `git push ""`）。 *(done 2026-04-24: two new classes in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` exercise the REAL handlers (dispatcher → `_on_comment_added` / `_on_change_merged`) while mocking the leaf side-effects so the two business-logic invariants are observable in isolation. **`TestGerritCommentAddedReviewBoundary`** (7 tests, 1 happy path + 5 parametrised non-`-1` cases + 1 missing-approvals case): mocks `backend.routers.tasks._persist` + `backend.notifications.notify`; asserts `_persist_task` called once with `external_issue_id == change_id` and `"gerrit-review-fix"` in labels for `Code-Review: -1`; asserts `_persist_task.assert_not_called()` for `+1` / `1` / `0` / `+2` / `2` / missing-approvals. The parametrised neighbours (0 / +2) catch any future refactor that regresses to "non-positive" or "negative-value" semantics — the contract is exact-match-on-string-"-1", not a range. **`TestGerritChangeMergedReplicationTargetsBoundary`** (7 tests, 6 parametrised empty/whitespace cases + 1 positive control): mocks `backend.workspace._run` + `notify` + `intent_bridge.on_gerrit_change_merged` + the three `asyncio.create_task` background stubs (`_package_merged_artifacts` / `_save_merged_solution_to_l3` / `_trigger_ci_pipelines`); parametrises `gerrit_replication_targets` over `""` / `"   "` / `"\t\n"` / `","` / `", ,  ,"` / `" ,\t, \n, "`; asserts `_run.assert_not_called()` — not "no push" but NO SHELL CALL AT ALL (the `if not targets: return` at `webhooks.py:322` short-circuits before even the `git remote get-url` lookup, which is the correct invariant since that lookup ALSO uses an unvalidated target string). Positive control with `"origin-mirror, github-backup"` asserts exactly 4 `_run` calls (2 targets × (get-url + push)) and explicitly asserts `'git push ""' not in cmd` and `"git push ''" not in cmd` — the boundary's raison d'être locked as a first-class assertion. All 27 tests in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` green in 7.05s against `omnisight-pg-test` (`OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@localhost:5434/omni_test`). Remaining Y-prep.1 sub-bullets: ~~HMAC real-sig fixture~~ (already done as part of the first sub-bullet — every test in this file signs with real `hmac.new(secret.encode(), raw, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()`), pytest.ini p0 marker still open.)*
- [x] 測試 fixture 要用真的 HMAC-SHA256 簽名而非 mock，確保 `X-Gerrit-Signature` verifier 和 handler 同步驗過。 *(done 2026-04-24: two deliverables in `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py`. **(1) Two new pytest fixtures** promote the previously-module-level helpers to first-class fixture surfaces — `gerrit_sign` (returns the real `hmac.new(secret.encode(), raw, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()` callable, with a docstring contract that explicitly forbids replacing it with a Mock — "the assertion that this is the real primitive is what gives `gerrit_sign` fixture its contract value") and `gerrit_signed_post` (high-level fixture that POSTs to `/api/v1/webhooks/gerrit` with auto-signed `X-Gerrit-Signature` header, accepts `signature=<override>` for negative tests and `omit_signature=True` for the missing-header path). The existing `_sign` helper is kept in place so the prior 27 tests don't churn — the change is purely additive. **(2) New `TestGerritWebhookSignatureVerifier` class with 4 tests** that lock the verifier↔handler synchronisation contract: `test_invalid_signature_rejected_no_dispatch` posts a bogus 64-char hex signature (`"deadbeef"*8`) and asserts 401 + all 3 handlers `assert_not_called`; `test_missing_signature_rejected_when_secret_configured` POSTs with no `X-Gerrit-Signature` header and asserts 401 + no dispatch (catches the regression "header is optional when secret configured"); `test_tampered_body_rejected_no_dispatch` signs body A but POSTs body B (same shape, different `change.id`) — proves the verifier digests the wire body, not a cached/empty buffer; `test_correct_signature_accepted_handler_dispatched` is the positive control through the SAME `gerrit_signed_post` fixture path used by the negative tests, so an "always-401" verifier regression can't sneak past either. **Why this contract is the bullet's deliverable**: the prior 27 tests all post correctly-signed payloads, so a verifier regression that always returns True (e.g. stray `scalar_ok = True`, flipped polarity at `webhooks.py:103`, deleted `compare_digest` "to speed tests up") would leave them green AND silently break prod. The 4 new tests prove the verifier is doing its job, completing the "fixture uses real HMAC AND the verifier is exercised in lock-step with the handler" loop. **Verification**: `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@localhost:5434/omni_test PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_webhooks.py -v --no-cov` → **31/31 green** in 8.57s (3 pre-existing `TestWebhookEndpoint` + 3 `TestGerritEventRouting` + 7 `TestGerritEventRoutingNegativeCases` + 7 `TestGerritCommentAddedReviewBoundary` + 7 `TestGerritChangeMergedReplicationTargetsBoundary` + 4 NEW `TestGerritWebhookSignatureVerifier`). SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep zero-match. Remaining Y-prep.1 sub-bullet: pytest.ini p0 marker.)*
- [x] CI gate：這三個測試加到 `backend/pytest.ini` 的 p0 marker，不准 skip。 *(done 2026-04-24: three deliverables — **(1) `backend/pytest.ini`** registers the new `p0` marker in the `markers =` section with a full docstring covering (a) which three tests it tags (`TestGerritEventRouting.test_patchset_created_dispatches_to_on_patchset_created` / `test_comment_added_dispatches_to_on_comment_added` / `test_change_merged_dispatches_to_on_change_merged`), (b) what "cannot be skipped" means mechanically (rejects `@pytest.mark.skip` + `@pytest.mark.skipif(True, ...)` at collection time; converts runtime `pytest.skip()` body calls into failures), and (c) the canonical way to run the gate (`pytest -m p0`). **(2) `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py`** — all three routing tests now carry `@pytest.mark.p0` immediately above the existing `@pytest.mark.asyncio` decorator, docstrings expanded to name-drop the p0 policy so future contributors don't silence a flake by adding `pytest.skip("fix later")`; `TestGerritEventRouting` class docstring gets a pointer to the conftest enforcement hook. **(3) `backend/tests/conftest.py`** wires two enforcement hooks — `pytest_collection_modifyitems` walks every collected item with a `p0` marker, iterates its markers, and for each `skip` / `skipif(truthy_literal)` appends to an offenders list; if non-empty raises `pytest.UsageError` (exit code 4 — "test config broken" not "test failed"), message lists every offender + nodeid so an author fixing multiple at once doesn't have to iterate; `skipif(False, ...)` / `skipif(None, ...)` stay allowed (a condition that provably never skips is benign and shouldn't trip the gate). Companion `pytest_runtest_makereport` is `@pytest.hookimpl(hookwrapper=True, tryfirst=True)`, narrowly scoped to `report.when == "call"` (setup/teardown skips like `pg_test_dsn` missing `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL` remain legitimate environment gates — the body-skip is the silent CI-gate hole we care about); flips `report.outcome` from `"skipped"` to `"failed"` and rewrites `longrepr` with a scannable `p0 CI-gate violation` prefix + the original skip reason preserved as breadcrumb. **Verification** — (a) `OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@localhost:5434/omni_test PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_webhooks.py -v --no-cov -m p0` → **3/3 green** (collects 31, deselects 28, runs the 3 p0-marked) in 2.31s; proves `-m p0` is a valid CI invocation and the three are correctly tagged. (b) full suite `python3 -m pytest backend/tests/test_webhooks.py -v --no-cov` → **31/31 green** in 9.13s; no regression. (c) **Hook self-check** — temp file with `@pytest.mark.p0 @pytest.mark.skip(...)` → pytest exits `EXIT_CODE=4` with `ERROR: p0 CI-gate violation: ...` message at collection; temp file with `@pytest.mark.p0` body calling `pytest.skip("...")` → pytest exits `EXIT_CODE=1` with the test marked FAILED and longrepr `p0 CI-gate violation: ... called pytest.skip() during the test body. ... Original skip reason: ...`; temp file with benign `@pytest.mark.skipif(False, ...)` → pytest exits `EXIT_CODE=0` with test PASSED (condition provably never skips, policy correctly allows). Scratch file removed. (d) SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) on `backend/pytest.ini` + `backend/tests/conftest.py` + `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py`: 0 matches. **Scope discipline** — the enforcement is test-only code (zero prod churn); module-global audit: no new globals added, new hooks read pytest's item/marker surface (already-collected state), `UsageError` raised by value not stored.)*

預估：**0.5 day**

### Y-prep.2 JIRA Webhook Secret Rotation API + UI 按鈕 (#288)

Gerrit 有 `POST /runtime/git-forge/gerrit/webhook-secret/generate`（`integration.py:1518`）提供 one-time reveal 的 rotate 體驗，JIRA 沒有對應 endpoint。operator rotate `jira_webhook_secret` 目前只能走 flat PUT /settings，沒有「僅此一次顯示明文」的 UX，secret 洩漏時不容易快速輪替。

- [x] 後端：`POST /runtime/git-forge/jira/webhook-secret/generate`，require_admin。mint 32-byte token、`_apply_runtime_setting("jira_webhook_secret", new_secret)` 走 SharedKV 鏡射、回 `{secret, secret_masked, webhook_url, signature_header, signature_algorithm, note}` 同 Gerrit 結構。 *(done 2026-04-24: new endpoint at `backend/routers/integration.py` — `@router.post("/git-forge/jira/webhook-secret/generate")` + `async def generate_jira_webhook_secret(request, _user=Depends(_au.require_admin))`. Mirrors the Gerrit generate endpoint (`integration.py:1540`) structurally — mints `_secrets.token_urlsafe(32)` (~43-char URL-safe base64, ~256 bits entropy), calls `_apply_runtime_setting("jira_webhook_secret", new_secret)` which writes both local `setattr(settings, ...)` AND Redis-backed `SharedKV` mirror (`jira_webhook_secret` was already in `_SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS` line 118 — so peer workers pick up the rotated secret on their next `_overlay_runtime_settings()` call, no extra plumbing needed). Response shape is identical 7-field Gerrit contract: `{status, secret, secret_masked, webhook_url, signature_header, signature_algorithm, note}`. **Transport-accurate field values** (not blind copy): `signature_header="Authorization"` + `signature_algorithm="bearer-token"` — JIRA Cloud webhooks use `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header (current verifier at `backend/routers/webhooks.py:712`), not HMAC body signing like Gerrit; the field names are structural parity with Gerrit, the values reflect the real transport. **Minimal refactor**: `_derive_webhook_url(request)` gained an optional `path: str = _WEBHOOK_PATH` param — backward-compatible (existing 2 Gerrit callers pass no `path` arg, keep their default); the JIRA endpoint passes `_JIRA_WEBHOOK_PATH = "/api/v1/webhooks/jira"` explicitly. X-Forwarded-Proto / X-Forwarded-Host honoured so cloudflared-tunnel deploys return the externally-routable URL. **Step 1 audits**: (a) module-global state — none added; the existing SharedKV mirror (`jira_webhook_secret` already registered line 118) handles cross-worker coherence, qualifying under SOP audit rule #2 ("透過 PG / Redis 協調") — rotated secret on worker-A surfaces on worker-B via `_overlay_runtime_settings()` in its next settings read path. (b) read-after-write timing — no concurrency-model change; single POST → `_apply_runtime_setting` → return, no A-write-then-B-read race introduced. **Step 3 fingerprint grep**: `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on modified file = 0 hits. **Live exercise** (not just import): handler invoked directly with mocked `Request` + forwarded headers → 7-field response, `resp['secret']` 43-char, `resp['webhook_url']=='https://omni.example.com/api/v1/webhooks/jira'`, `resp['signature_header']=='Authorization'`, `resp['signature_algorithm']=='bearer-token'`, `settings.jira_webhook_secret == resp['secret']` verifies persistence into the SharedKV-mirrored field. **Regression check** neighbor `TestGerritWebhookInfo` 9/9 green in 2.89s against `omnisight-pg-test` — proves the `_derive_webhook_url` default-param refactor didn't break existing Gerrit URL derivation (honours X-Forwarded-*, default path `/api/v1/webhooks/gerrit` unchanged).)*
- [x] 前端：`components/omnisight/integration-settings.tsx` JIRA Section（看起來還在 Notifications tab）加一顆「ROTATE WEBHOOK SECRET」按鈕；點下去 confirm dialog → 顯示 one-time modal（copy-to-clipboard）→ 關閉後只能看到 masked preview，對齊 Gerrit Wizard Step 5 UX。 *(done 2026-04-24: new `JiraWebhookSecretRotateDialog` component in `components/omnisight/integration-settings.tsx` — four-phase state machine (`confirm` → `rotating` → `revealed` → `error`). `confirm` phase surfaces a hardware-orange warning that rotation invalidates the old secret + Cancel/Rotate-Now buttons; `rotating` is a spinner; `revealed` shows plain `secret` in a `select-all` code block beside a Copy button + `webhook_url` + backend-provided `note`, with an emerald "SAVED & CLOSE" CTA; `error` surfaces the API message + Retry. **One-time-reveal safety:** while in `revealed` phase, the backdrop click is disabled (would otherwise silently destroy an unrecoverable value); only the deliberate Close / X / SAVED button dismisses. On dismiss, the masked preview (`••••abc4`) bubbles up via `onRotated` to parent `IntegrationSettings`, which stores it in `jiraLastRotatedMasked` and renders it inline beside the ROTATE button (`••• rotated • ••••abc4`) so the operator has a visual confirmation of the rotated state without exposing the plaintext again. Pre-rotate inline status falls back to `settingsData.webhooks.jira_secret` ("configured" or "not configured" — backend never returns a real mask via GET /settings, only the rotate response does; this is the same constraint the Gerrit wizard works around). **API client:** new `generateJiraWebhookSecret()` in `lib/api.ts` posting to `/runtime/git-forge/jira/webhook-secret/generate` — structural type-alias `JiraWebhookSecretRotateResult = GerritWebhookSecretRotateResult` since the backend intentionally returns the identical 7-field shape. **Button placement:** added to JIRA ISSUE TRACKING section (webhooks tab — task description hedged "looks still in Notifications tab"; actual tab is `webhooks` since `2026-04` consolidation) rather than the INBOUND WEBHOOK SECRETS Jira Secret password row, so the rotate UX sits with the rest of the JIRA knobs (URL/Token/Project) where an operator is already thinking about JIRA; the manual-paste password input stays in place for operators who pre-generate the secret out-of-band. **Type check:** `tsc --noEmit` produces 3 pre-existing errors on HEAD (GitForgeTokenTestResult index-signature miss at lines 3170/3217/3289) that are unrelated to this change; my changes introduce zero new TS errors. **Regression:** `vitest run test/components/integration-settings{,-sse}.test.tsx` → 56/56 green in 4.10s — existing suite covers the surrounding modal contract and confirms no accidental breakage of settings / SSE / save / discard flows.)*
- [x] `test_integration_settings.py` 加 `test_jira_webhook_secret_rotate_one_time_reveal` + `test_jira_webhook_secret_requires_admin`。 *(done 2026-04-24: new `TestJiraWebhookSecretRotate` class at `backend/tests/test_integration_settings.py` sits alongside `TestGerritWebhookInfo` in the same file. **Test 1 — `test_jira_webhook_secret_rotate_one_time_reveal`** pins the one-time-reveal contract end-to-end: POST returns the plain `secret` + 7-field paste-ready payload exactly once; `len(secret) >= 32` (token_urlsafe(32) ~43-char URL-safe base64, ~256 bits entropy); persists onto `settings.jira_webhook_secret`; mirrors into the SharedKV so peer workers converge (`captured["jira_webhook_secret"] == secret` assertion proves the `_apply_runtime_setting` mirror path actually fired — the cross-worker guarantee for the inbound `POST /api/v1/webhooks/jira` verifier on replica-B); `webhook_url` honours `X-Forwarded-Proto` / `X-Forwarded-Host` (cloudflared deploys); `signature_header=="Authorization"` + `signature_algorithm=="bearer-token"` (JIRA Bearer transport, not Gerrit HMAC — structural parity, accurate values); subsequent `GET /settings` surfaces only `webhooks.jira_secret=="configured"` — the plaintext does NOT appear anywhere in the response body (`secret not in info.text` belt-and-braces); two back-to-back POSTs yield different secrets and the later write wins, proving rotate-primitive semantics. **Test 2 — `test_jira_webhook_secret_requires_admin`** flips `OMNISIGHT_AUTH_MODE=strict` + pre-seeds a known `jira_webhook_secret`, then fires the POST without any session cookie: asserts `status_code in (401, 403)` AND that `settings.jira_webhook_secret` was NOT mutated (belt-and-braces: if a future refactor runs the handler body before the `require_admin` gate, the not-mutated check catches it even if the status code regresses). **Test-pollution audit**: the rotate handler writes to the Redis-backed `SharedKV` which normally persists across tests (leaking the rotated secret into `TestSettingsEndpoint::test_webhooks_block_reports_four_secret_states`'s `jira_secret==""` contract via the overlay). Fixed by `monkeypatch.setattr(_i._runtime_settings_kv, "set"|"get_all", ...)` — writes route into a test-local `captured` dict, overlay within the test still sees the write (so the cross-worker assertion + GET /settings "configured" assertion are both exercised) but the dict is dropped at fixture teardown so real SharedKV is never touched. Addresses the SOP Step-1 module-global-state audit rubric #2 ("coordinate via Redis") — this test isolates the write via monkeypatch rather than leaking it. Reproduced the leak first (`TestJiraWebhookSecretRotate::…rotate…` followed by `TestSettingsEndpoint::test_webhooks_block_reports_four_secret_states` = 1 failed / 1 passed), then verified the fix (same pair = 2/2 green). **Regression run**: full `test_integration_settings.py` = 99/99 green in 16.72s (97 pre-existing + 2 new); focused rerun including `TestGerritWebhookInfo` + `TestSettingsEndpoint::test_webhooks_block_reports_four_secret_states` = 12/12 green in 3.43s — proves the new tests don't pollute the webhooks-block contract test or the Gerrit counterpart suite.)*
- [x] 旋轉後其他 worker 要能立即用新 secret 驗 HMAC——這塊靠現有 SharedKV overlay 已經 cover（`_SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS` 有 `jira_webhook_secret`），測一下跨 worker 確認生效。 *(done 2026-04-24: completed the SharedKV overlay loop on the READ side. Write side was already wired — `_apply_runtime_setting("jira_webhook_secret", ...)` in the rotate endpoint mirrors into the Redis-backed SharedKV (`jira_webhook_secret ∈ _SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS` at line 118 of `backend/routers/integration.py`), so rotating on worker-A makes the new secret visible to all peers via Redis. But the inbound `POST /api/v1/webhooks/jira` verifier at `backend/routers/webhooks.py:704-731` read `settings.jira_webhook_secret` **directly** — no `_overlay_runtime_settings()` call — so worker-B's per-process singleton remained stale until some other request path (GET /runtime/settings, /runtime/providers) happened to trigger the overlay first. Under Caddy round-robin LB with 4 aggregate workers (2 replicas × OMNISIGHT_WORKERS=2), that's a non-deterministic "eventually consistent" window where JIRA's first few webhooks after rotate could 401 on any worker that hadn't received a settings read yet — the exact multi-worker shape the 2026-04-22 "GitHub/GitLab token 消失了" incident fixed at the settings-page level but left unfixed for inbound webhook verification. **Fix**: 1-line addition in `backend/routers/webhooks.py::jira_webhook` — `from backend.routers.integration import _overlay_runtime_settings; _overlay_runtime_settings()` executed BEFORE the `settings.jira_webhook_secret` read. Placement rationale: overlay before the 503 (empty secret) branch too, because worker-B booted from a `.env` with empty secret would 503 under the old code even though SharedKV holds the rotated value. Cost: single Redis HGETALL per inbound webhook (~1ms), guarded by try/except inside the overlay helper so Redis-down falls back to local settings rather than raising. Docstring expanded to document the write-side ↔ read-side contract and why both halves are needed to close the cross-worker loop. **Test**: new `test_jira_webhook_secret_cross_worker_propagation` in `backend/tests/test_integration_settings.py::TestJiraWebhookSecretRotate` — 5-phase end-to-end simulation. Phase 1 POSTs to the rotate endpoint (simulated worker-A), captures the new secret + asserts both local settings and the SharedKV mirror hold it. Phase 2 uses `monkeypatch.setattr(settings, "jira_webhook_secret", "stale-from-env-boot")` to simulate worker-B's divergent in-memory state (the captured dict is the Redis stand-in shared by both simulated workers, matching prod's "SharedKV is the single source of truth across workers"). Phase 3 fires `POST /api/v1/webhooks/jira` with `Authorization: Bearer <new_secret>` + asserts 200 (not 401) — the critical cross-worker acceptance assertion; a regression where the overlay call is dropped from the webhook handler fails here instead of silently regressing inbound JIRA events in prod. Phase 3 also asserts the overlay's side-effect leaves `settings.jira_webhook_secret == new_secret` on the worker that received the webhook. Phase 4 fires the SAME webhook with the stale Bearer token + asserts 401 — proves the overlay is replacement, not additive, so the old secret is fully invalidated post-rotate. Phase 5 runs the rotate-again scenario: second rotate on simulated worker-A → worker-B (again simulated stale) accepts the NEWER secret and rejects the previous one, locking rotate-primitive semantics end-to-end. The `captured` dict is scoped to the `monkeypatch` fixture so real SharedKV is never touched (same test-pollution guard pattern established by bullet #3). **Verification**: `TestJiraWebhookSecretRotate` 3/3 green in 2.50s against `omnisight-pg-test` (`OMNI_TEST_PG_URL=postgresql://omni_test:omni_test_pw@localhost:5434/omni_test`); full combined `test_webhooks.py + test_integration_settings.py` regression = 131/131 green in 25.20s — proves the overlay-call addition doesn't regress the 27 existing webhook tests (positive routing / negative routing / review-boundary / replication-targets-boundary / signature-verifier) nor the 100 existing integration-settings tests. **SOP Step 1 module-global audit** (rubric #2 — coordinate via Redis): the modification reads SharedKV (Redis-backed) via overlay and writes to per-worker `settings` singleton. All workers converge to the same value because they all read the same Redis hash; qualifies as rubric #2 "through Redis coordination". No new module-globals introduced; the existing `_runtime_settings_kv` singleton is the coordination anchor, already audited in prior bullets. **SOP Step 1 read-after-write timing**: no concurrency model change — single handler call runs overlay → 503/401 check → dispatch sequentially; no new A-write-then-B-read race. **SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep** (`_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]`) on `backend/routers/webhooks.py` + `backend/tests/test_integration_settings.py` = 0 hits. **Scope discipline**: only JIRA webhook handler touched; Gerrit/GitHub/GitLab webhooks have the same class of gap but are explicitly out of scope for Y-prep.2 — should be tracked as a follow-up task if the same class of silent rotate-lag bug is ever observed for those transports. **Note on "HMAC" in the task text**: JIRA Cloud uses Bearer-token auth (`Authorization: Bearer <secret>`), not HMAC body signing — the verifier at `webhooks.py:712` uses `_hmac.compare_digest` (timing-safe string compare) not `_hmac.new(...).hexdigest()`. The task description said "HMAC" loosely to mean "shared-secret inbound auth"; the test + fix cover the Bearer-token path which is what JIRA actually uses.)*

預估：**0.5 day**

### Y-prep.3 JIRA 入站 webhook 事件路由器 (#289)

現在 `webhooks.py:705-731` 只 sync status 回 internal Task DB（若有 match 的話），沒有任何 automation trigger。operator 在 JIRA ticket 留 comment 想觸發 agent、status 轉 Done 想觸發 artifact 上傳、issue created 想做 intake——都沒辦法。這顆補一個可配置的事件 → action 路由。

- [x] 新 `backend/routers/webhooks.py::_on_jira_event()` dispatcher，解析 JIRA webhook payload 的 `webhookEvent` 欄位（`jira:issue_created` / `jira:issue_updated` / `comment_created` 等）。 *(done 2026-04-24: added `_on_jira_event(event)` dispatcher + three `_on_jira_*` handler stubs (`_on_jira_comment_created` / `_on_jira_issue_updated` / `_on_jira_issue_created`) to `backend/routers/webhooks.py`. Dispatcher wired into `jira_webhook` request path inside a try/except so dispatcher failure never blocks the existing status-sync path (both paths are independent — dispatcher fires for ALL events, status-sync only when a Task matches the issue key). Routes `comment_created` + `comment_updated` to the comment handler (so edited `/command` comments are re-evaluated); routes `jira:issue_updated` → status-transition handler; routes `jira:issue_created` → intake-label handler; unknown events log-and-return. Handler bodies are intentional stubs — the next Y-prep.3 bullet (`backend/jira_event_router.py`) fleshes out the 3 actions (CATC `/command` emit + artifact packaging on Done + `intent_bridge` intake). SOP Step 1: module-global audit clean (pure function, no module-level cache — each worker derives the same routing from the same payload, qualified answer #1); read-after-write timing clean (no concurrency model change — sequential dispatcher-then-status-sync). SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on webhooks.py = 0 hits. Import sanity + 6-case runtime smoke (4 positive dispatch + unknown + missing-webhookEvent) all green. Full `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` = 31/31 green in 8.29s against `omnisight-pg-test` — zero regression on existing Gerrit/Jira paths. Scope: dispatcher only; remaining Y-prep.3 bullets (jira_event_router module, audit events, config fields + UI, 3 handler tests, docs page) remain open and intentionally out of scope for this commit.)*
- [x] 新 `backend/jira_event_router.py` 定義 event type → handler 映射。三個 MVP handler：
  - `comment_created` 且 comment body 以 `/<command>` 開頭 → emit `jira_command` event 到 CATC（O5 IntentSource 已經吃這個 topic）。
  - `jira:issue_updated` 且 `status.to` 變為特定值（config whitelist，default `["Done", "Closed"]`） → trigger artifact packaging（沿用 Gerrit change-merged 的 artifact pipeline）。
  - `jira:issue_created` 若 issue 有特定 label（config `OMNISIGHT_JIRA_INTAKE_LABEL`，default `omnisight-intake`） → call intent_bridge 建立 CATC task。 *(done 2026-04-24: new module `backend/jira_event_router.py` exposes `ROUTES` (str → coro mapping) + `route(webhook_event, event)` + three async handlers `handle_comment_created` / `handle_issue_updated` / `handle_issue_created`. The `webhooks.py` stubs from the previous bullet now delegate via lazy import — dispatcher and action logic stay in separate files. Handler 1 (comment): `_extract_command()` parses `<prefix><word>[ args]` (default prefix `/`, configurable via `OMNISIGHT_JIRA_COMMAND_PREFIX`); positive path publishes `jira_command` on `events.bus` with `{issue_key, command, args, author, comment_id}` and writes a `jira.command_received` audit row; bare `/`, no prefix, and empty body all return `{status: ignored, reason: no_command_prefix}`. Handler 2 (status): `_extract_status_transition()` walks `changelog.items[]` for `field == "status"`; positive path spawns `_package_merged_artifacts(f"jira:{issue_key}", summary)` via `asyncio.create_task` (reuses Gerrit change-merged tarball pipeline) and writes `jira.status_transitioned` audit row; whitelist pulled from `OMNISIGHT_JIRA_DONE_STATUSES` CSV (default `Done,Closed`); non-whitelisted status returns `{status: ignored, reason: status_not_whitelisted}`. Handler 3 (intake): reads `issue.fields.labels[]`, matches against `OMNISIGHT_JIRA_INTAKE_LABEL` (default `omnisight-intake`); positive path calls `intent_bridge.on_intake_queued(parent=issue_key, vendor="jira", cards_with_task_ids=[], dag_id=...)` and writes `jira.intake_triggered` audit row; missing label returns `{status: ignored, reason: missing_intake_label}`. All three audit calls and the bus.publish are best-effort wrapped — a downed audit DB or bus never breaks the dispatcher path. SOP Step 1: module-global state audit clean (qualified answer #1 — `ROUTES` is an immutable mapping of Python constants, identical across uvicorn workers; no module-level cache; configuration re-read per-call from env so a rotate is visible immediately). Read-after-write timing audit clean (handlers run sequentially within `_on_jira_event`; no parallelism introduced; the `_package_merged_artifacts` background task is fire-and-forget and shares no writer with the sync path). SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on `jira_event_router.py` + `webhooks.py` = 0 hits. Runtime smoke: 9-case dispatch (3 positive + 6 negative across all 3 handlers, plus unknown event + dispatcher integration) all green; full `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` = 31/31 green in 9.99s against `omnisight-pg-test` DSN — zero regression on existing Gerrit/Jira routing/contract tests. Scope: handlers + routing table only; remaining Y-prep.3 bullets (audit events richer context, config promotion to `_SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS` + Notifications-tab UI, dedicated 3-handler unit tests, `docs/integrations/jira-automation.md` page) remain open and intentionally out of scope for this commit. Audit rows are already emitted by this commit — the next bullet refines the per-tenant context wiring once Y4 lands real tenants.)*
- [x] 三個 handler 都走 audit event（`jira.command_received` / `jira.status_transitioned` / `jira.intake_triggered`），繼承當前 tenant context（`t-default` 暫時，Y4 後會走真 tenant）。 *(done 2026-04-24: the prior bullet already emitted the three action strings unconditionally via `_audit()`; this bullet hardens the tenant-inheritance seam end-to-end. (1) `backend/routers/webhooks.py::_on_jira_event` now wraps the dispatcher in `set_tenant_id(prior_tenant or "t-default")` + `finally: set_tenant_id(prior_tenant)` — an authenticated admin-replay caller whose contextvar is already set keeps its tenant; an anonymous webhook gets the `t-default` floor. This is the single-line Y4 swap-point — when real per-tenant JIRA routing lands, this one line becomes `set_tenant_id(derive_tenant_from_event(event))`. (2) `backend/jira_event_router.py::_audit` replaces the hardcoded `_DEFAULT_TENANT_ID` in the actor string with `current_tenant_id() or _DEFAULT_TENANT_ID` so audit rows self-document `actor=jira_event_router/<live-tenant>` without a schema change, and also stamps `after.tenant_id = <live-tenant>` so operators can grep by it. The core `audit.log` tenant plumbing (`tenant_insert_value()` → `audit_log.tenant_id`) was already correct; the change here simply makes the intent and the audit-row-visible tenant id match on the wire. SOP Step 1: module-global audit — qualified answer #3 (contextvars are task-local by design, cross-worker AND cross-request isolation is guaranteed by the Python runtime). Read-after-write timing audit clean — no new parallelism; the dispatcher still awaits each handler in-order. SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on `jira_event_router.py` + `webhooks.py` = 0 hits. SOP Step 4 drift guard: new `backend/tests/test_jira_event_router_tenant_audit.py` (6 tests, all green) pins the three action strings, the t-default fallback when no contextvar is set, the explicit-tenant inheritance path (future Y4 proof with `set_tenant_id("t-alpha")`), and the dispatcher's contextvar capture+restore invariant (prior tenant of None stays None after dispatch). Regression: full `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` 31/31 + `backend/tests/test_audit.py` 32/32 green against `omnisight-pg-test` — zero regression on existing Gerrit/Jira routing and per-tenant audit chain isolation.)*
- [x] Config 加入 `_SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS`：`jira_intake_label` / `jira_done_statuses`（CSV）。UI 在 Notifications tab JIRA section 加兩個 SettingField。 *(done 2026-04-24: two new `Settings` fields landed in `backend/config.py` — `jira_intake_label: str = ""` (empty ⇒ router uses default `omnisight-intake`) and `jira_done_statuses: str = ""` (empty ⇒ router uses default `Done,Closed`). Both promoted into `_SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS` in `backend/routers/integration.py` so a Notifications-tab edit on worker-A is mirrored via Redis SharedKV and picked up on workers B/C/D's next `_overlay_runtime_settings()` — same cross-worker-coherence guarantee as the rest of the JIRA family (`jira_webhook_secret`, `notification_jira_token`). Both also added to `_UPDATABLE_FIELDS` so the flat `PUT /runtime/settings` path accepts them, and exposed unmasked in the GET /runtime/settings response under `jira.intake_label` / `jira.done_statuses` (they're routing knobs, not credentials — masking would defeat the UI). `backend/jira_event_router.py::_intake_label()` and `_done_statuses()` now resolve in `settings → env → built-in default` precedence so a Notifications-tab save reconfigures the router on the same request without restart while keeping the existing `OMNISIGHT_JIRA_INTAKE_LABEL` / `OMNISIGHT_JIRA_DONE_STATUSES` env-var path working for headless deploys (and the env value seen during the previous bullet's tests still flows through). Module docstring updated to spell out the new precedence + cross-worker mirror so the next reader doesn't have to chase 3 files. Notifications tab JIRA section in `components/omnisight/integration-settings.tsx` got two new `<SettingField>` rows — "Intake Label" (writes `jira_intake_label`) and "Done Statuses" (writes `jira_done_statuses`) — using the existing `getVal(category, field, dirtyKey)` 3-arg form to bridge the GET-response key shape (`jira.intake_label`) to the dirty-key shape (`jira_intake_label`); footnote line documents the built-in defaults so an operator with empty inputs immediately knows what's running. SOP Step 1 module-global audit clean (qualified answer #2 — both knobs go through Redis-backed SharedKV which is the existing coordination mechanism for the rest of `_SHARED_KV_STR_FIELDS`; no new module-level cache introduced). Read-after-write timing audit clean (no concurrency-model change; settings → env → default is a sequential per-call resolver). SOP Step 3 fingerprint grep `_conn\(\)|await conn\.commit\(\)|datetime\('now'\)|VALUES.*\?[,)]` on `backend/config.py` + `backend/routers/integration.py` + `backend/jira_event_router.py` = 0 hits. Runtime smoke: 4-branch precedence test (built-in default → settings overlay → env-only → settings-wins-over-env) all green; SHARED_KV + UPDATABLE membership invariants asserted in-process. Regression: `backend/tests/test_webhooks.py` + `backend/tests/test_jira_event_router_tenant_audit.py` = 37/37 green in 3.92s; `backend/tests/test_integration_settings.py` = 100/100 green in 5.05s; frontend `test/components/integration-settings.test.tsx` = 51/51 green in 4.54s — zero regression across 188 tests covering JIRA dispatcher / settings GET-PUT contracts / SettingsModal rendering. Scope: config + router resolver + UI fields only; the remaining Y-prep.3 bullets (3-handler positive/negative tests + `docs/integrations/jira-automation.md` operator page) stay open.)*

Three positives lock the happy-path side effects: `handle_comment_created` publishes a `jira_command` bus event with the parsed `{issue_key, command, args, author, comment_id}` shape and emits the `jira.command_received` audit string; `handle_issue_updated` spawns `_package_merged_artifacts("jira:<key>", summary)` (yield-once after `asyncio.create_task` so the AsyncMock actually receives the await) and emits `jira.status_transitioned`; `handle_issue_created` calls `intent_bridge.on_intake_queued(parent=<key>, vendor="jira", cards_with_task_ids=[], dag_id="jira-intake:<key>")` and emits `jira.intake_triggered`. Three negatives map 1:1 to the user-spec bullet: (a) "wrong event type" — driven through `_on_jira_event` dispatcher with a `jira:issue_updated` webhook carrying a comment-shaped body, asserts `handle_comment_created` is never awaited and the bus stays silent (the dispatcher correctly routes by `webhookEvent`, not by payload contents); (b) "non-whitelisted status" — `In Progress → In Review` returns `{ignored, status_not_whitelisted, from, to}`, no packaging, no audit; (c) "missing label" — issue with `labels=["bug","p1"]` returns `{ignored, missing_intake_label, labels}`, bridge not called, no audit. All four side-effect seams (`_audit` / `_publish_bus` / `_package_merged_artifacts` / `intent_bridge.on_intake_queued`) are stubbed so the tests stay hermetic — no DB / Redis / pool dependency, runs in 0.22s standalone. The audit-row + tenant DB contract is already locked separately in `test_jira_event_router_tenant_audit.py` (6 tests); this commit explicitly does NOT duplicate that DB round-trip — the two files form non-overlapping halves of the Step-4 drift-guard surface (this file: dispatch-shape + negatives; tenant_audit file: audit-row persistence + tenant inheritance).
